name: Lu'ashal
description: While the Lightbloom in Eversong has devastated much of the native wildlife, a few creatures have instead been strengthened by its power. Lu'ashal has grown to gargantuan size from the surging Holy energy and is now as dangerous as it is beautiful.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText: Lu'ashal assails foes in a holy frenzy, raining energy from the skies with [Radiant Sunder]  to shatter the ground that  leave [Blinding Fissures] behind. During [Radiant Flare] , she unleashes waves of [Radiant Embers] that tarvel across the battlefield.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Dawncrazed Halo] inflicts moderate damage in an area around afflicted players.
$bullet; [Radiant Flare] inflicts substantial damage and casues [Radiant Embers] to erupt from [Blinding Fissures] .

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Dawnfire Breath] inflicts heavy Radiant damage in a cone at the primary target.
$bullet; [Radiant Flare] inflicts substantial damage and casues [Radiant Embers] to erupt from [Blinding Fissures] .

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Dawncrazed Halo] inflicts moderate damage in an area around afflicted players.
$bullet; [Radiant Flare] inflicts substantial damage and casues [Radiant Embers] to erupt from [Blinding Fissures] .

sections.title: Radiant Flare
sections.bodyText: Lu'ashal erupts in a lightcrazed rage, inflicting 99250 Radiant damage to all players and causing all existing Blinding Fissure to erupt simultaneously, releasing Radiant Ember that burst outwards in all directions.

sections.title: Radiant Ember
sections.bodyText: Inflicts 81882 Radiant damage to players that come into contact with an ember and knocks them back.

sections.title: Radiant Sunder
sections.bodyText: Lu'ashal calls down searing Holy energy from the skies, inflicting 148876 Radiant damage to players within the impact area. The impact tears open a Blinding Fissure .

sections.title: Blinding Fissure
sections.bodyText: Players standing in the area suffer 37219 Radiant damage every 1 sec and their chance to hit is reduced by 100%.

sections.title: Dawncrazed Halo
sections.bodyText: Lu'ashal afflicts players with a searing halo that inflicts 37219  Radiant damage to the target and all allies within 6 yards every 3 sec for 9 sec.

sections.title: Dawnfire Breath
sections.bodyText: Lu'ashal exhales a breath of holy flame at her primary target, inflicting Radiant damage every 0.5 sec for 2 sec sec to her primary target and players standing in the area.

name: Thorm'belan
description: Once a docile creature known to roam Harandar's southern wilds, Thorm'belan was forever changed when it became afflicted by The Lightbloom. The enraged beast must now be killed before it runs rampant across the surrounding wetlands.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText: Thorm'belan unleashes the power of the Light to assault the players. Periodically lobbing [Scintillating Shards] while also pulling players in towards itself with [Shredding Tendrils].

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Scintillating Shard] causes all players to become stunned if it is not intercepted.
$bullet; [Shredding Tendrils] pulls players towards Thorm'belan and inflicts damage until players move far enough away from Thorm'belan.
$bullet; [Radiant Mote] damages and disorients nearby players when it expires.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Scintillating Shard] causes all players to become stunned if it is not intercepted.
$bullet; [Shredding Tendrils] pulls players towards Thorm'belan and inflicts damage until players move far enough away from Thorm'belan.
$bullet; [Radiant Mote] damages and disorients nearby players when it expires.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Scintillating Shard] causes all players to become stunned if it is not intercepted.
$bullet; [Shredding Tendrils] pulls players towards Thorm'belan and inflicts damage until players move far enough away from Thorm'belan.
$bullet; [Radiant Mote] damages and disorients nearby players when it expires.

sections.title: Scintillating Shard
sections.bodyText: Thorm'belan hurls a light-infused shard towards a location.  Intercepting this shard as it strikes the ground inflicts 74438 Holy damage to players within 3 yards of the impact and causes the shard to bounce to a new location. If no players are within the effect the shard explodes triggering a Shard Eruption

sections.title: Shard Eruption
sections.bodyText: Contact with the ground causes the shard to erupt in a radiant blast that inflicts 99251 Holy damage to all players, stunning them for 4 sec.

sections.title: Shredding Tendrils
sections.bodyText: Thorm'belan binds all players in a cone wth vines, pulling them towards its location and inflicting 14888 Nature damage every 2 sec for up to 20 sec. The vines snap when their victims move far enough away from the caster, ending the effect.

sections.title: Radiant Mote
sections.bodyText: Thorm'belan embeds motes of searing light into several targets, inflicting 37219 Holy damage every 3 sec for 9 sec. Upon expiration, a Dazzling Radiance is triggered.

sections.title: Dazzling Radiance
sections.bodyText: The mote erupts in a dazzling cascade of light, inflicting 74438 Holy damage to all other players within 12 yards of the detonation, causing them to become disoriented for 6 sec.

sections.title: Rending Claw
sections.bodyText: Thorm'belan rends their target's flesh, inflicting 198501 Physical damage and causing them to bleed for an additional 49625 Physical damage every 3 sec for 12 sec.

name: Predaxas
description: Glutted on the writhing Voidstorm's spawn, Predaxas stalks the wilds hunting for prey. It does not rest, it does not reason, it devours with a hunger as insatiable as the dark.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText: Predaxas thrashes about the Gorging Pit ejecting his late lunch at foes with [Regurgitation] and crushing vermin with [Seismic Slam].

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Regurgitation] ejects Predaxas' previous meals which attack players.
$bullet;[Seismic Slam] knocks back players and Predaxas' previous meals, causing additional effects.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Seismic Slam] knocks back players and Predaxas' previous meals, causing additional effects.
$bullet;Voidticks react to [Seismic Slam] triggering [Voidscatter].

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Reguritated Bloodclaws periodically gain [Bestial Rage] inflicting increased damage.
$bullet;[Seismic Slam] knocks back players and Predaxas' previous meals, causing additional effects.

sections.title: Devour
sections.bodyText: Predaxas' stomachs rumble, seeking a meal. Blitzing to a position they attempt to eat prey every 1.8 sec for up to 7 sec inflicting 74438 Nature damage and stunning for 3 sec players within 9.5 yards of the indicated location.

sections.title: Regurgitation
sections.bodyText: Predaxas expels some of its stomach contents inflicting 99251 Nature damage plus an additional 12406 Nature damage every 1 sec for 12 sec to players in a frontal cone. Additional enemies emerge from the spray attacking players.

sections.title: Radiating Voidtick
sections.bodyText: This blistercreep isn't aware why it is present but is more than content nibbling enemies.

sections.title: Toxin Splatter
sections.bodyText: The consumptor shakes it off spraying toxins throughout inflicting 12406 Nature damage.

sections.title: Bestial Rage
sections.bodyText: Enters a bestial rage increasing damage done by 100% for 18 sec.

sections.title: Seismic Slam
sections.bodyText: Predaxas lurches multiple times inflicting 24813 Nature damage to players within 300 yards, knocking back. Regurgitated creatures react to this effect.

sections.title: Voidscatter
sections.bodyText: Seismic Slam vibrates the blistercreep showering cosmic hail inflicting 99251 Shadow damage to players within 5 yards of each impact location.

sections.title: Bilepool
sections.bodyText: Seismic Slam scatters digestive fluids off the consumptor leaving behind a zone for 45 sec. This area inflicts 17369 Nature damage every 1 sec and reduces movement speed by 20%.

sections.title: Blood Nova
sections.bodyText: Seismic Slam jostles the shredclaw ejecting myocardial fluid inflicting 17369 Shadow damage and an additional 2481 Shadow damage every 1 sec, increasing damage taken by 3% for 9 sec. This effect stacks.

name: Cragpine
description: Ancient as the cliffs themselves, Cragpine has slumbered for centuries beneath a canopy of towering pines. Now stirred by the careless intrusion of mortals, he rises to defend his glade, bending the forest itself to his will.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText:
Cragpine calls upon the treants of Zul'Aman with [Rootquake] as he shakes the earth beneath his feet.

The forest itself answers his call as he awakens [Ancient Seeds] slumbering in the soil.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Rootquake] inflicts heavy damage to all players.
$bullet;Floating [Ancient Seeds] inflict damage to nearby players.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Cragpine inflicts heavy melee damage while wielding a [War Club].
$bullet;Angry treants pursue players endlessly until destroyed.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Angry treants pursue players endlessly until destroyed.
$bullet;Floating [Ancient Seeds] inflict damage to nearby players.

sections.title: Rootquake
sections.bodyText: Cragpine stomps the earth, inflicting 86844 Physical damage to players within 60 yards and causing Erupting Roots to emerge. The disturbance awakens slumbering treants.

sections.title: Erupting Roots
sections.bodyText: Piercing roots erupt from the earth, inflicting 111657 Nature damage to players within 6 yards and knocking them upwards.

sections.title: Angry Treant
sections.bodyText: This treant fixates on a nearby player after being rudely awakened.

sections.title: War Club
sections.bodyText: Cragpine grows a mighty pine from the earth and wields it as a war club, causing his next 10 melee attacks to inflict additional Physical damage.

sections.title: Ancient Seeds
sections.bodyText: Cragpine awakens ancient seeds deep within the earth. These seeds pulse with energy, inflicting 37219 Nature damage every 2 sec for 1 min.

name: Chimaerus the Undreamt God
description: When Aln'hara was taken from her Cradle, only pain and madness were left to shape the chaos of the rift. Chimaerus feasted on the void left behind, gorging itself on other nightmarish manifestations. Now it stands as the monster within the rift: a being of agony and rage.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText:
Chimaerus wrenches its enemies into the Rift during [Alndust Upheaval] where they must contend with aberrant Manifestations shielded by [Alnshroud]. Manifestations that lose their shroud emerge into Reality and move towards the [Insatiable] Chimaerus.

Upon reaching 100 energy, Chimaerus takes to the skies with [Corrupted Devastation] while summoning Manifestations below.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Alndust Upheaval] allows players to see into the Aln and attack Manifestations.
$bullet; Coalesced Manifestations afflict the raid with [Rift Sickness].
$bullet; Manifestations in Reality move toward [Insatiable] Chimaerus.
$bullet; Colossal Horrors unleash a series of [Colossal Strikes] against their current target.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Alndust Upheaval] allows players to see into the Aln and attack Manifestations.
$bullet; Coalesced Manifestations afflict the raid with [Rift Sickness].
$bullet; Manifestations in Reality move toward [Insatiable] Chimaerus.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; Coalesced Manifestations afflict the raid with [Rift Sickness].
$bullet; [Alndust Upheaval] allows players to see into the Aln and attack Manifestations.
$bullet; Players within the Rift who are affected by [Alnsight] cannot interact with allies.

sections.title: Dissonance
sections.bodyText: Players periodically inflict 116551 Nature damage to allies in a 8 yard radius within the opposing realm.

sections.title: Alndust Upheaval
sections.bodyText: Chimaerus tears a hole in Reality, inflicting 1165514 Physical damage to its current target and inflicting 93241 Nature damage to several players. Victims are knocked into the air and gain Alnsight .

sections.title: Alnsight
sections.bodyText: Players are wrenched into the Rift, allowing them to see Manifestations within the Aln for 40 sec.

sections.title: Alndust Upheaval
sections.bodyText: Chimaerus tears a hole in Reality, inflicting 1165514 Physical damage to its current target and 1554019 Nature damage split evenly between players within 10 yards of the impact. Victims are knocked into the air and gain Alnsight .

sections.title: Alnsight
sections.bodyText: Players are wrenched into the Rift, allowing them to see Manifestations within the Aln for 40 sec.

sections.title: Rift Vulnerability
sections.bodyText: Exposure from the Rift increases damage taken from Alndust Upheaval by 600% for 1.5 min. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Rift Emergence
sections.bodyText: Chimaerus unleashes an unearthly roar, inflicting 213678 Nature damage to all players and causing Manifestations to emerge throughout the Rift.

sections.title: Rift Sickness
sections.bodyText: As each Manifestation emerges within the Rift, they release a wave of sickness, causing all players to absorb the next 43719 healing received.

sections.title: Alnshroud
sections.bodyText: Manifestations emerge enshrouded in an ephemeral shield that absorbs 215284 damage. Upon removal, the Manifestation crosses the threshold into Reality, leaving behind Alndust Essence .

sections.title: Alndust Essence
sections.bodyText: A pool of essence that inflicts 58276 Nature damage every 1 sec to players within it and reduces movement speed by 50%.

sections.title: Discordant Roar
sections.bodyText: The Colossal Horror unleashes a dreadful roar, inflicting 139862 Physical damage to all players. Ignores Armor. Increases the damage of Discordant Roar by 20%. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Colossal Strikes
sections.bodyText: The Colossal Horror unleashes a series of three strikes at its current target over 1 sec, inflicting 388505 Physical damage and 135977 Nature damage with each strike.

sections.title: Fearsome Cry
sections.bodyText: The Haunting Essence unleashes a scream, inflicting 54391 Nature damage every 1 sec to all players for 3 sec and causing them to flee in fear.

sections.title: Essence Bolt
sections.bodyText: The Manifestation launches a bolt of essence at a random player, inflicting 116551 Nature damage.

sections.title: Swarming Shade
sections.bodyText: A swarming horror called from the Rift.

sections.title: Insatiable
sections.bodyText: Chimaerus feasts on any Manifestations in Reality within its reach, casting Cannibalized Essence for every Manifestation consumed.

sections.title: Cannibalized Essence
sections.bodyText: Cannibalizing a Manifestation inflicts 388505 Nature damage to all players and heals Chimaerus for 500% of the Manifestation's remaining vitality. In addition, Chimaerus' damage done is increased by 100%. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Rift Madness
sections.bodyText: Chimaerus causes several players within the Rift to succumb to madness, inflicting 77701 Nature damage to players within 6 yards and horrifying them, causing them to suffer 19425 Nature damage every 1 sec. This effect increases in intensity every 3 sec. Allies outside the Rift can stand nearby the victims to swap realms with them after a short duration, saving them from the madness.

sections.title: Consuming Miasma
sections.bodyText: Chimaerus surrounds several players with ravenous energy, causing them to suffer 69931 Nature damage every 1.5 sec for 1 min. Upon removal, the target erupts with Lingering Miasma and consumes Alndust Essence within 10 yards.

sections.title: Lingering Miasma
sections.bodyText: The energies surrounding the player erupt, causing players within 10 yards to suffer 62164 Nature damage every 1 sec for 6 sec and knocking them back. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Caustic Phlegm
sections.bodyText: Chimaerus launches globs of phlegm at all players, inflicting 32168 Nature damage every 1 sec for 20 sec.

sections.title: Rending Tear
sections.bodyText: Chimaerus slashes in the direction of a nearby target, inflicting 233103 Physical damage to players in a frontal cone, causing them to bleed for 124321 Physical damage every 1.5 sec for 6 sec and knocking them away.

sections.title: Consume
sections.bodyText: Chimaerus consumes the essence of its enemies, inflicting 178712 Nature damage every 2 sec for 10 sec. Upon finishing its channel, Chimaerus knocks players away and consumes any remaining Manifestations, casting Cannibalized Essence for each Manifestation consumed.

sections.title: Cannibalized Essence
sections.bodyText: Cannibalizing a Manifestation inflicts 388505 Nature damage to all players and heals Chimaerus for 500% of the Manifestation's remaining vitality. In addition, Chimaerus' damage done is increased by 100%. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Rift Vulnerability
sections.bodyText: Exposure from the Rift increases damage taken from Alndust Upheaval by 600% for 1.5 min. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Corrupted Devastation
sections.bodyText: Chimaerus sweeps across its den, exhaling corruption that inflicts 1165514 Nature damage to players standing in the area and stuns them for 1 sec. The spewed corruption coalesces Manifestations and leaves behind Alndust Essence .

sections.title: Ravenous Dive
sections.bodyText: Chimaerus descends to the ground, inflicting 116551 Physical damage to all players upon landing and knocking them into the air. Any remaining Manifestations are consumed, causing Chimaerus to cast Cannibalized Essence for each Manifestation consumed.

sections.bodyText: Cannibalizing a Manifestation inflicts 388505 Nature damage to all players and heals Chimaerus for 500% of the Manifestation's remaining vitality. In addition, Chimaerus' damage done is increased by 100%. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Rift Shroud
sections.bodyText: Chimaerus is protected by the shroud of its den while in the air, reducing damage taken by 99%.

name: Imperator Averzian
description: Imperator Averzian wages a relentless campaign, seeking not conquest, but annihilation. His entire will is bent to a singular ambition: to rend the veil between worlds and carve a breach into the Void itself. Through this wound, his infinite host shall pour forth, drowning Azeroth in darkness.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText:
Averzian uses [Shadow's Advance] to claim territory on the battlefield. Territory claimed cannot be retaken, and if Averzian claims three adjacent territories in a row he unleashes the [March of the Endless].

Causing an [Umbral Collapse] on a territory being taken prevents its capture.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; Abyssal Voidshapers attempt to use [Gathering Darkness] at full power.
$bullet; Shadowguard Stalwarts attempt to empower their allies with [Pitch Bulwark].

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Dark Upheaval] inflicts periodic damage to all players.
$bullet;[Umbral Collapse] inflicts damage to everyone that is reduced by the number of players at the impact location.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; Averzian gains [Void Claimed] while close to ground he controls.
$bullet; When Averzian strikes his current target he infects them with [Blackening Wounds].

sections.title: Shadow's Advance
sections.bodyText: Averzian summons Abyssal Voidshapers onto the battlefield. As his minions emerge, they inflict 291378 Shadow damage to players within 10 yards and knocks them away.

sections.title: Umbral Barrier
sections.bodyText: Enshrouded by the Void, the caster reduces all damage taken by 99% unless impacted by an Umbral Collapse .

sections.title: Void Rupture
sections.bodyText: The Abyssal Voidshaper claims territory for Averzian, inflicting 349654 Shadow damage to players within 12 yards and an additional 350466 Shadow damage to players caught in the star burst blast. Each claimed territory brings Averzian's army closer to the March of the Endless .

sections.title: Abyssal Voidshaper
sections.bodyText: On Heroic difficulty, Abyssal Voidshapers cast [Gathering Darkness] to transform into Obscurion Endwalkers.

sections.title: Umbral Barrier
sections.bodyText: Enshrouded by the Void, the caster reduces all damage taken by 99% unless impacted by an Umbral Collapse .

sections.title: Gathering Darkness
sections.bodyText: At full power, the Voidshaper transforms into an Obscurion Endwalker.

sections.title: Gnashing Void
sections.bodyText: The Voidmaw's melee attacks inflict 20202 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 10 sec. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Voidmaw
sections.bodyText: On Heroic difficulty, at 35% health remaining the Voidmaw crawls towards the nearest void-claimed space to restore its health.

sections.title: Gnashing Void
sections.bodyText: The Voidmaw's melee attacks inflict 20202 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 10 sec. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Hobbled
sections.bodyText: While at 35% health remaining, the Voidmaw's movement speed is reduced by 75%.

sections.title: Dark Resilience
sections.bodyText: Upon reaching 35% health remaining, the Voidmaw approaches the closest void-claimed space to restore its health.

sections.title: Pitch Bulwark
sections.bodyText: The caster grants a shield to allies that absorbs the next 1324824 damage.

sections.title: Cosmic Shell

sections.bodyText: The Abyssal Malus curses several players with a dark miasma, inflicting 97126 Shadow damage and reducing their haste by 70% for 15 sec.

sections.title: Umbral Collapse
sections.bodyText: Averzian collapses void energy around his target, inflicting 555562 Shadow damage to all players. This damage is reduced by the number of players within 10 yards of the impact location.

sections.title: Umbral Collapse
sections.bodyText: Averzian collapses void energy around his target, inflicting 555562 Shadow damage to all players. This damage is reduced by the number of players within 10 yards of the impact location.

sections.title: Void Marked
sections.bodyText: Averzian marks several targets with a devouring void. Upon removal, applies Lingering Darkness and consumes an application of Cosmic Shell within 7 yards.

sections.title: Lingering Darkness
sections.bodyText: Returning from the brink of the Void leaves scars, inflicting 54391 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 10 sec.

sections.title: Oblivion's Wrath
sections.bodyText: Averzian launches void lances outward, inflicting 350466 Shadow damage to players in their path and knocking them back.

sections.title: Void Fall
sections.bodyText: Averzian knocks back players and rains destruction onto the field at several destinations, inflicting 350466 Shadow damage to players within 7 yards of the impact locations.

sections.title: Shadow Phalanx
sections.bodyText: A column of Averzian's troops march across the field, inflicting 427355 Shadow damage every 1 sec to players in their path.

sections.title: March of the Endless
sections.bodyText: With three adjacent portals empowering each other, Averzian tears open the void unleashing the endless march, inflicting 427355 Shadow damage every 1 sec to players in its path.

sections.title: Dark Upheaval
sections.bodyText: Averzian harnesses the Void, inflicting 143747 Shadow damage to all players. He then continues to radiate energy, inflicting 30303 Shadow damage every 1 sec.

sections.title: Blackening Wounds
sections.bodyText: Averzian's melee attacks infect his target with void, reducing their maximum health by 4% for 20 sec. This effect stacks. When Averzian's troops take the field, the target with the highest amount of Blackening Wounds becomes Weakened .

sections.title: Weakened
sections.bodyText: Voidspawn rush toward the player with the highest amount of Blackening Wounds for the next 10 sec.

sections.title: Imperator's Glory
sections.bodyText: Averzian gains 75% increased damage and reduces his damage taken by 99% while within 10 yards of claimed territory.

sections.title: Imperator's Glory
sections.bodyText: Averzian gains 75% increased damage and reduces his damage taken by 99% while within 10 yards of claimed territory.

sections.title: Imperator's Glory
sections.bodyText: Averzian gains 75% increased damage and reduces his damage taken by 99% while within 10 yards of claimed territory.

name: Vorasius
description: A colossal predator born in the wastes of the Voidstorm, Vorasius grew to an incredible size fueled by an endless hunger. Summoned to the battle raging at the base of the Voidspire by Voidlight Everdawn, this colossal monster now feasts on both sides.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText:
Vorasius periodically strikes the ground with [Shadowclaw Slam], creating crystals that divide the battlefield. The behemoth then shakes off parasitic creeps that explode in a [Blisterburst] upon death.

As the battle rages, Vorasius sweeps his deadly [Void Breath] from one side of the battlefield to the other, decimating anything caught in its path.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; The explosion of [Blisterburst]  is powerful enough to damage Void Crystals.

$bullet; [Shadowclaw Slam] causes reverberating [Aftershocks] from its impact location.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; The explosion of [Blisterburst]  is powerful enough to damage Void Crystals.

$bullet; [Primordial Roar] causes Vorasius to gain more [Primordial Power] with each cast.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Shadowclaw Slam] inflicts deadly damage to the raid if it fails to hit at least one player.

$bullet; [Overpowering Pulse] is triggered when no enemies are near Vorasius.

sections.title: Void Breath
sections.bodyText: Vorasius sweeps a deadly beam across the battlefield, immediately inflicting  3108037 Shadow damage to all players in front of him and 388505 Shadow damage every 1 sec to players caught in its path. The beam radiates Dark Energy while active, inflicting 34965 Shadow damage every 0.5 sec for 15 sec.

sections.title: Dark Energy
sections.bodyText: Vorasius sweeps a deadly beam across the battlefield, immediately inflicting  3108037 Shadow damage to all players in front of him and 388505 Shadow damage every 1 sec to players caught in its path. The beam radiates Dark Energy while active, inflicting 34965 Shadow damage every 0.5 sec for 15 sec.

sections.title: Parasite Expulsion
sections.bodyText: Vorasius shakes off parasitic Blistercreeps, spraying the battlefield with globs of dark ichor that inflict 271953 Shadow damage to players within 3 yards upon impact.

sections.title: Blistercreep
sections.bodyText: A parasitic spawn that fixates on a player.

sections.title: Blisterburst
sections.bodyText: The Blistercreep explodes upon death, inflicting 271953 Shadow damage to players within 8 yards, increasing their damage taken by 100% for 30 sec and knocking them away. The explosion also inflicts 97126 Shadow damage to all players.

sections.title: Creep Spit
sections.bodyText: The Blistercreep periodically spits void ichor at a player, reducing their movement speed by 30% for 20 sec. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Dark Goo
sections.bodyText: Dark ichor that inflicts 77701 Shadow damage to players within the area every 1 sec.

sections.title: Shadowclaw Slam
sections.bodyText: Vorasius slams a giant claw into the ground, inflicting 699308 Shadow and 699308 Physical damage to players in the impact area and 271953 Shadow damage to all players. If the central impact fails to hit at least 1 player, Vorasius inflicts 777009 Shadow damage to all players instead. The impact of the larger claws applies Smashed and creates Void Crystals.

sections.title: Smashed
sections.bodyText: The impact from Vorasius's larger claws increases the victim's Physical damage taken by 150% for 2 min. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Aftershock
sections.bodyText: Shadowclaw Slam creates seismic aftershocks that reverberate from the impact location, inflicting 466206 Physical damage to players within the area.

sections.title: Void Crystal
sections.bodyText: Dark crystals that divide the battlefield. Strong enough to withstand anything but the explosions of [Blisterburst].

sections.title: Primordial Roar
sections.bodyText: Vorasius takes a deep breath, pulling players closer before unleashing a deafening roar that inflicts 349654 Physical damage to all players and knocks them away.

sections.title: Primordial Power
sections.bodyText: Vorasius gathers power with each roar, radiating 17405 Shadow damage to all players every 2 sec.

sections.title: Overpowering Pulse
sections.bodyText: If no player is within reach, Vorasius pulses with deadly void energy.

name: Fallen-King Salhadaar
description: After turning on Xal'atath, the fallen king Salhadaar has become a captive of the very Shadowguard he once commanded. Tortured, delirious, and infused with the Void, he awaits his death--or a chance to win his people's freedom from Xal'atath's grasp.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText:
Fallen-King Salhadaar is infused with power from the surrounding machinery, slowly increasing his energy over time. Upon reaching 100 energy, he is overwhelmed by the Void and begins his [Entropic Unraveling]. 

Periodically, the Riftlabs produce orbs of Concentrated Void that are drawn toward Salhadaar. When an orb of Concentrated Void reaches him, he performs a [Void Infusion].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; Orbs of Concentrated Void cause a [Void Infusion] when they reach Salhadaar.
$bullet; Salhadaar takes increased damage during [Entropic Unraveling].
$bullet; Salhadaar creates several Fractured Images that cast [Shadow Fracture].

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; When orbs of Concentrated Void are destroyed, they apply [Dark Radiation] to all players.
$bullet; [Despotic Command] inflicts periodic damage to nearby players and applies [Oppressive Darkness] when removed.
$bullet; [Entropic Unraveling] inflicts heavy periodic damage to all players.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; Orbs of Concentrated Void cause a [Void Infusion] when they reach Salhadaar.
$bullet; Spikes erupt from the target of [Shattering Twilight].
$bullet; Salhadaar's melee attacks apply [Destabilizing Strikes].

sections.title: Void Convergence
sections.bodyText: The machinery of the Riftlabs produces orbs of Concentrated Void that are drawn towards Salhadaar. Players who come into contact with an orb are afflicted by Void Exposure . Salhadaar consumes orbs on contact, causing a Void Infusion .

sections.title: Concentrated Void
sections.bodyText: An orb of dark energy that is drawn towards Salhadaar.

sections.title: Void Exposure
sections.bodyText: Exposes players to an excessive amount of void energy, inflicting 77701 Shadow damage every 1 sec to players within it.

sections.title: Void Infusion
sections.bodyText: Salhadaar consumes the orb on contact, inflicting 1165514 Shadow damage to all players and an additional 194252 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 1 min.

sections.title: Void Convergence
sections.bodyText: The machinery of the Riftlabs produces orbs of Concentrated Void that are drawn towards Salhadaar. Players who come into contact with an orb are afflicted by Void Exposure . Salhadaar consumes orbs on contact, causing a Void Infusion .

sections.bodyText: An orb of dark energy that is drawn towards Salhadaar.

sections.title: Void Exposure
sections.bodyText: Exposes players to an excessive amount of void energy, inflicting 77701 Shadow damage every 1 sec to players within it.

sections.title: Dark Radiation
sections.bodyText: Orbs of Concentrated Void cover all players in void essence when destroyed, inflicting 93241 Shadow damage every 2 sec for 8 sec. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Void Infusion
sections.bodyText: Salhadaar consumes the orb on contact, inflicting 1165514 Shadow damage to all players and an additional 194252 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 1 min.

sections.title: Void Convergence
sections.bodyText: The machinery of the Riftlabs produces orbs of Concentrated Void that are drawn towards Salhadaar. Players who come into contact with an orb are afflicted by Void Exposure . Salhadaar consumes orbs on contact, causing a Void Infusion .

sections.title: Concentrated Void
sections.bodyText: An orb of dark energy that is drawn toward Salhadaar.

sections.title: Enduring Void
sections.bodyText: An orb remnant of dark energy that is drawn toward Salhadaar. Reactivated during [Void Convergence].

sections.bodyText: Exposes players to an excessive amount of void energy, inflicting 77701 Shadow damage every 1 sec to players within it.

sections.title: Dark Radiation
sections.bodyText: Orbs of Concentrated Void cover all players in void essence when destroyed, inflicting 93241 Shadow damage every 2 sec for 8 sec. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Void Infusion
sections.bodyText: Salhadaar consumes the orb on contact, inflicting 1165514 Shadow damage to all players and an additional 194252 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 1 min.

sections.title: Entropic Unraveling
sections.bodyText: Upon reaching 100 energy, Salhadaar is overwhelmed by the Void. He unravels violently, inflicting 77701 Shadow damage to all players every 1 sec and taking 25% increased damage for 20 sec.   Upon expiration, Salhadaar leaves behind Torturous Extract .

sections.title: Torturous Extract
sections.bodyText: Lingering void energy that inflicts 128207 Shadow damage every 1 sec to players within it.

sections.title: Umbral Beams
sections.bodyText: Beams of pure void radiate from Salhadaar, inflicting 388505 Shadow damage every 0.3 sec to players within them.

sections.title: Shattering Twilight
sections.bodyText: Salhadaar hurls a dark star at his current target, inflicting 1068388 Shadow damage upon impact and causing Twilight Spikes to erupt outwards from the impact location.

sections.title: Twilight Spikes
sections.bodyText: Dark energy erupts from the ground, inflicting 621607 Shadow damage every 2 sec to players within it.

sections.title: Shattering Twilight
sections.bodyText: Salhadaar hurls a dark star at his current target, inflicting 1068388 Shadow damage upon impact and causing Twilight Spikes to erupt outwards from the impact location.

sections.title: Twilight Spikes
sections.bodyText: Dark energy erupts from the ground, inflicting 621607 Shadow damage every 2 sec to players within it.

sections.title: Twilight Spikes

sections.title: Fractured Projection
sections.bodyText: Salhadaar manifests several Fractured Images of himself nearby.

sections.title: Shadow Fracture
sections.bodyText: The Fractured Image releases a burst of void energy, inflicting 971262 Shadow damage to all players and leaving behind Torturous Extract . The image then reintegrates with Salhadaar.

sections.title: Fractured Projection
sections.bodyText: Salhadaar manifests several Fractured Images of himself nearby.

sections.title: Shadow Fracture
sections.bodyText: The Fractured Image releases a burst of void energy, inflicting 971262 Shadow damage to all players and leaving behind Torturous Extract . The image then reintegrates with Salhadaar.

sections.title: Nexus Shield
sections.bodyText: A dark barrier that protects from crowd control and interrupt effects.

sections.title: Despotic Command
sections.bodyText: Salhadaar attempts to bend several players to his will, inflicting 38850 Shadow damage every 1 sec to players within 5 yd of afflicted players for 12 sec. When this aura expires, Salhadaar shrouds the wearer in Oppressive Darkness and creates a pool of Torturous Extract at the wearer's location.

sections.title: Oppressive Darkness
sections.bodyText: Darkness smothers the affected player, absorbing 158979 healing.

sections.title: Torturous Extract
sections.bodyText: Lingering void energy that inflicts 128207 Shadow damage every 1 sec to players within it.

sections.title: Twisting Obscurity
sections.bodyText: Salhadaar releases a bolt of twisting darkness that jumps between all players, inflicting 46621 Shadow damage upon contact and an additional 27972 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 26 sec.

sections.title: Destabilizing Strikes
sections.bodyText: Salhadaar's melee attacks destabilize his current target, inflicting 13986 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 15 sec. This effect stacks.

name: Vaelgor & Ezzorak
description: Born as clutchmates in the red dragonflight, Vaelgor and Ezzorak were once the guardians of all living things. Now, twisted by the dark will of Xal'atath, all that remains of their former selves is their unyielding bond to one another.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText:
The dragon siblings begin battle alternating between flying and grounded combat, swapping after [Midnight Flames] at full power. In response, the Lightbound Vanguard offer aid by providing their [Radiant Barrier] to nearby players.

Eventually, both dragons land, combining their draconic might to annihilate players once and for all.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText: $bullet;[Gloom] applies [Gloomtouched] upon contact and shrinks the [Gloomfield] formed.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;The Lightbound Vanguard grant [Radiant Barrier] to players nearby, reducing [Midnight Flames]' high damage.
$bullet;[Gloomtouched] players decrease the total damage inflicted by [Gloom] and shrink the [Gloomfield] formed.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Rakfang] and [Vaelwing] empower the dragon when cast at the same target.
$bullet;Receiving [Nullbeam] stacks decrease the [Nullzone]'s pull magnitude for all players.

sections.title: Nullbeam
sections.bodyText: Vaelgor expels crystalline spacetime every 0.5 sec for 4 sec to players in a frontal direction. This outpouring inflicts 233103 Physical damage plus an additional 7284 Shadow damage every 0.5 sec for 8 sec. This effect stacks. Upon completion, the lattice shatters, forming a Nullzone and tethering all players. Nullzone's pull magnitude weakens as Nullbeam stacks, up to 12 times.

sections.title: Nullzone
sections.bodyText: Forms an unstable rift which tethers players, pulling inward and inflicting 12141 Shadow damage every 1 sec. This effect stacks. Stretching this tether an additional 10 yards beyond the initial radius triggers a Nullsnap. If no other tethered players remain, the field collapses, triggering a Nullzone Implosion instead.

sections.title: Nullsnap
sections.bodyText: The cosmic bindings shatter, inflicting 11655 Shadow damage to all players.

sections.title: Nullsnap
sections.bodyText: The cosmic bindings shatter, inflicting 11655 Shadow damage to all players.

sections.title: Nullzone Implosion
sections.bodyText: The cosmic field collapses, inflicting 77701 Shadow damage and an additional 27195 Shadow damage every 0.5 sec for 9 sec to all players.

sections.title: Nullzone Implosion
sections.bodyText: The cosmic field collapses, inflicting 77701 Shadow damage and an additional 27195 Shadow damage every 0.5 sec for 9 sec to all players.

sections.title: Nullscatter
sections.bodyText: Nullzone's first tether snap releases a cascade of cosmic hail, inflicting 233103 Shadow damage to players within 4 yards of each impact location.

sections.title: Dread Breath
sections.bodyText: Vaelgor roars toward a targeted player, fearing players in a massive frontal cone. The dragon's breath inflicts 252528 Shadow damage and an additional 145689 Shadow damage every 3 sec, increasing movement speed by 50%,21 sec.

sections.title: Dread Breath
sections.bodyText: Vaelgor roars toward a targeted player, fearing players in a massive frontal cone. The dragon's breath inflicts 252528 Shadow damage and an additional 145689 Shadow damage every 3 sec, increasing movement speed by 50%,21 sec.

sections.title: Vaelwing
sections.bodyText: Vaelgor buffets his primary target, knocking them away and inflicting 437068 Shadow damage and 339942 Physical damage. This attack empowers Vaelgor's melee attacks, causing them to inflict 155402 Shadow damage. This effect stacks, increasing in intensity each Vaelwing until Vaelwing strikes a new target.

sections.title: Tail Lash
sections.bodyText: Vaelgor knocks away players within a 35 yard rear cone, bleeding for 97126 Physical damage plus an additional 33994 Physical damage every 0.5 sec for 4 sec.

sections.title: Gloom
sections.bodyText: Ezzorak ejects a moving mass of pure darkness in a frontal direction, inflicting 242815 to (242815 * 4) Shadow damage to all players upon arrival, creating a Gloomfield. Gloom damage done and the size of Gloomfield decreases up to 7 times as players contact the darkness, applying Gloomtouched.

sections.title: Gloomtouched
sections.bodyText: A dark malady drips from those in contact with Gloom, inflicting 194252 Shadow damage plus an additional 87414 Shadow damage every 3 sec for 12 sec to players within 0 yards of the contacting player. This effect stacks. Upon removal, Gloomtouched applies Diminish.

sections.title: Diminish
sections.bodyText: Gloomtouched's affliction weighs heavily on targets, increasing damage taken by Gloomtouched by 1000% for 1.3 min. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Gloomfield
sections.bodyText: Galactic emptiness engulfs a massive location in darkness for 2.5 min, inflicting 38850 Shadow damage every 0.5 sec and reducing movement speed by 75%.

sections.title: Void Howl
sections.bodyText: Ezzorak wreathes all players in shadow, inflicting 267097 Shadow damage to players within 5 yards of each player. Summons a Voidorb at each players' location.

sections.title: Voidbolt
sections.bodyText: The Voidorb ejects raw void magic at a player, inflicting 77701 Shadow damage plus an additional 24282 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 5 sec. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Rakfang
sections.bodyText: Ezzorak strikes his primary target, inflicting 825573 Physical damage and 242816 Shadow damage. This attack empowers Ezzorak's melee attacks, causing them to absorb the next 66241 healing. This effect stacks, increasing in intensity each Rakfang until Rakfang strikes a new target.

sections.title: Impale
sections.bodyText: Ezzorak slams targets within a 35 yard rear cone, bleeding for 194252 Physical damage plus an additional 38900 Physical damage every 1 sec and stunning for 6 sec. This occurs immediately after casting Rakfang.

sections.title: Midnight Flames
sections.bodyText: Upon reaching 100 energy, Ezzorak and Vaelgor fly as one, each spewing 233103 Shadow damage to all players plus an additional 21368 Shadow damage every 0.5 sec for 25 sec.

sections.title: Twilight Bond
sections.bodyText: The clutchmates share a link, increasing damage done by 100% if their remaining health diverges by at least 10% of total health, or are closer than 15 yards of each other. If one of the dragons dies, the remaining dragon gains Twilight Fury.

sections.title: Twilight Fury
sections.bodyText: Upon seeing their sibling perish, the remaining dragon enters a draconic rage, increasing damage done by 30%. This effect stacks, increasing in intensity over time.

sections.title: Grappling Maw
sections.bodyText: While flying, the dragon lashes their primary target in cosmic entanglement, inflicting between 233103 and (233103 * 10) Shadow damage, increasing in damage as distance between the dragon and their target increases. The dragon then pulls the distant target nearby.

sections.title: Midnight Manifestation
sections.bodyText: Xal'atath appears, tipping the scales and enfeebling targeted players, then vanishes. This malediction inflicts 24282 Shadow damage every 2 sec. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Cosmosis
sections.bodyText: Xal'atath draws shadow power from her target, creating an Astral Reflection. This extradimensional clone lingers momentarily, casting the target's ability, then disintegrates.

sections.title: Lightbound Vanguard
sections.bodyText: If present, War Chaplain Senn, General Amias Bellamy, and/or Commander Venel Lightblood join in the battle against Vaelgor & Ezzorak.

sections.title: Radiant Barrier
sections.bodyText: Senn eminates holy power for 9 sec, blessing players within 0 yards. Every 1 sec, this applies protection to nearby players that absorbs 115922 Midnight Flames damage. If present, Bellamy and/or Lightblood increase the amount of absorb granted. (100 - 75)% of Midnight Flames damage pierces this absorb. Additionally, gaining Radiant Barrier consumes Midnight Manifestation, spawning a Manifestation of Midnight or infusing an existing Manifestation for each aura stack consumed.

sections.title: Shadowmark
sections.bodyText: The manifestation taints targets inflicting 36422 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 4 sec. Upon expiration the mark detonates inflicting 466206 Shadow damage to other players within 8 yards of the marked target.

sections.title: Unbound Shadow
sections.bodyText: Every 30 sec, the manifestation darkens, increasing attack speed by 75% and reducing the speed at which they can be slowed to by 50%. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Aura of Light
sections.bodyText: The presence of the Lightbound Vanguard weakens this enemy's vitality, reducing their maximum health by 5% and damage done by 5%. This effect stacks for each present member of the Vanguard.

name: Lightblinded Vanguard
description: Once paragons of the Light, Senn, Bellamy, and Lightblood have surrendered to their own blinding zealotry--their faith perverted into a ruthless fanaticism that now compels them to smite all who oppose them.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText:
The Lightblinded Vanguard attacks players relentlessly as their energy slowly increases.

When a member of the Vanguard reaches 100 energy, they activate an Aura to empower their allies and unleash their most devastating attack.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; War Chaplain Senn protects allies within her [Aura of Peace], pacifying any players who attack them.
$bullet; Damage from [Execution Sentence] is split evenly between all players hit.
$bullet; [Sacred Shield] grants immunity to interrupt effects while the shield holds.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Tyr's Wrath] absorbs a large amount of healing done to affected players.
$bullet; Damage from [Execution Sentence] is split evenly between all players hit.
$bullet; General Bellamy silences players struck by [Divine Toll].

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Judgment] significantly increases damage taken from [Final Verdict] and [Shield of the Righteous].
$bullet; Damage from [Execution Sentence] is split evenly between all players hit.
$bullet; Members of the Vanguard with an active Aura greatly empower their nearby allies.

sections.title: Zealous Spirit
sections.bodyText: A Zealous Spirit emboldens a member of the Vanguard, increasing their damage done by 30% for 20 sec and empowering one of their abilities. Upon expiration, the Spirit manifests and seeks out a new member of the Vanguard.

sections.title: Spirit of the Mender
sections.bodyText: The manifested Spirit moves to Bellamy's side, preparing to unleash Tyr's Wrath alongside her next Divine Toll. It then emboldens Bellamy with Zealous Spirit, increasing her damage and empowering her Avenger's Shield.

sections.title: Spirit of the Defender
sections.bodyText: The manifested Spirit moves to Lightblood's side, preparing to unleash Divine Toll alongside his next Execution Sentence. It then emboldens Lightblood with Zealous Spirit, increasing his damage and empowering his Divine Storm.

sections.title: Spirit of the Vindictive
sections.bodyText: The manifested Spirit moves to Senn's side, preparing to unleash Execution Sentence alongside her next Tyr's Wrath. It then emboldens Senn with Zealous Spirit, increasing her damage and empowering her Searing Radiance.

sections.title: Aura of Wrath
sections.bodyText: Upon reaching 100 energy, Lightblood emanates an Aura of Wrath for 15 sec, increasing Holy damage done by 100% for allies within 40 yards. Upon expiration, Lightblood consecrates the ground beneath his feet.

sections.title: Divine Consecration
sections.bodyText: Consecrated ground inflicts 126264 Holy damage to players within every 1 sec, increases all damage they take by 100%, and pacifies them.

sections.title: Aura of Wrath
sections.bodyText: Upon reaching 100 energy, Lightblood emanates an Aura of Wrath for 15 sec, increasing Holy damage done by 100% for allies within 40 yards. Upon expiration, Lightblood consecrates the ground beneath his feet.

sections.title: Consecration
sections.bodyText: Consecrated ground inflicts 38850 Holy damage to players within every 1 sec.

sections.title: Aura of Wrath
sections.bodyText: Upon reaching 100 energy, Lightblood emanates an Aura of Wrath for 15 sec, increasing Holy damage done by 100% for allies within 40 yards. Upon expiration, Lightblood consecrates the ground beneath his feet.

sections.title: Execution Sentence
sections.bodyText: Execution Sentence 300 yd range Instant

sections.title: Divine Hammer
sections.bodyText: Holy hammers spiral outward, inflicting 466206 Holy damage to players in their path.

sections.title: Forbearance
sections.bodyText: After using a powerful ability, members of the Vanguard cannot be affected by Avenging Wrath or Divine Shield for 2.5 min.

sections.title: Execution Sentence
sections.bodyText: Lightblood marks several players then attempts to execute them 3 sec later, inflicting 1748271 Holy damage split evenly among players within 8 yards of their location and increasing damage taken from Execution Sentence by 500% for 5 sec. 3 Divine Hammers then spiral outward from the impact location.

sections.title: Divine Hammer

sections.title: Forbearance
sections.bodyText: After using a powerful ability, members of the Vanguard cannot be affected by Avenging Wrath or Divine Shield for 2.5 min.

sections.bodyText: Lightblood unleashes a devastating storm of Holy energy, inflicting 174827 Holy damage to players within 8 yards.

sections.title: Divine Tempest
sections.bodyText: A vortex of holy energy that inflicts 116551 Holy damage to players within 3 yards every 1 sec and reduces their movement speed by 25%.

sections.title: Sacred Toll
sections.bodyText: Lightblood deems players within 100 yards unworthy, inflicting 231160 Holy damage to them.

sections.title: Judgment
sections.bodyText: Lightblood passes judgment on his current target, inflicting 505056 Holy damage and increasing damage they take from Final Verdict by 500% for 5 sec. After passing judgment, Lightblood immediately casts Final Verdict on his current target.

sections.title: Final Verdict
sections.bodyText: Lightblood unleashes a devastating strike on his current target that inflicts 777009 Holy damage.

sections.title: Avenging Wrath
sections.bodyText: Lightblood calls upon the Light to become an avatar of its fury, increasing his damage done by 30% and damage taken by 20% for 20 sec.

sections.title: Forbearance
sections.bodyText: After using a powerful ability, members of the Vanguard cannot be affected by Avenging Wrath or Divine Shield for 2.5 min.

sections.title: Aura of Devotion
sections.bodyText: Upon reaching 100 energy, Bellamy emanates an Aura of Devotion for 25 sec, reducing damage taken by 75% for allies within 40 yards. Upon expiration, Bellamy consecrates the ground beneath her feet.

sections.title: Divine Consecration
sections.bodyText: Consecrated ground inflicts 126264 Holy damage to players within every 1 sec, increases all damage they take by 100%, and pacifies them.

sections.bodyText: Upon reaching 100 energy, Bellamy emanates an Aura of Devotion for 25 sec, reducing damage taken by 75% for allies within 40 yards. Upon expiration, Bellamy consecrates the ground beneath her feet.

sections.title: Consecration
sections.bodyText: Consecrated ground inflicts 38850 Holy damage to players within every 1 sec.

sections.title: Aura of Devotion
sections.bodyText: Upon reaching 100 energy, Bellamy emanates an Aura of Devotion for 25 sec, reducing damage taken by 75% for allies within 40 yards. Upon expiration, Bellamy consecrates the ground beneath her feet.

sections.title: Divine Toll
sections.bodyText: Bellamy unleashes a volley of holy shields every 2 sec for 18 sec. Shields that hit players inflict 466206 Holy damage and silence them for 6 sec.

sections.title: Forbearance
sections.bodyText: After using a powerful ability, members of the Vanguard cannot be affected by Avenging Wrath or Divine Shield for 2.5 min.

sections.title: Avenger's Shield
sections.bodyText: Bellamy targets several players with holy shields that explode on impact, inflicting 151517 Holy damage plus an additional 88385 Holy damage every 0.5 sec to players within 5 yards.

sections.title: Light Infused
sections.bodyText: Bellamy is infused with holy light that inflicts 18454 Holy damage to all players every 2 sec. This damage increases by 25% every time a member of the Vanguard unleashes their aura.

sections.title: Judgment
sections.bodyText: Bellamy passes judgment on her current target, inflicting 505056 Holy damage and increasing damage they take from Shield of the Righteous by 500% for 5 sec. After passing judgment, Bellamy immediately casts Shield of the Righteous on her current target.

sections.title: Shield of the Righteous
sections.bodyText: Bellamy slams her current target with her shield, inflicting 777009 Holy damage.

sections.title: Divine Shield
sections.bodyText: The Vanguard member calls upon the Light to protect them, becoming immune to all damage and harmful effects for 8 sec.

sections.title: Forbearance
sections.bodyText: After using a powerful ability, members of the Vanguard cannot be affected by Avenging Wrath or Divine Shield for 2.5 min.

sections.title: Aura of Peace
sections.bodyText: 5 sec. Upon expiration, Senn consecrates the ground beneath her feet.

sections.bodyText: Consecrated ground inflicts 126264 Holy damage to players within every 1 sec, increases all damage they take by 100%, and pacifies them.

sections.title: Aura of Peace
sections.bodyText: 5 sec. Upon expiration, Senn consecrates the ground beneath her feet.

sections.title: Tyr's Wrath
sections.bodyText: Senn brings Tyr's Wrath down upon the 5 players nearest to her every 5 sec, absorbing the next 662412 healing they receive. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Forbearance
sections.bodyText: After using a powerful ability, members of the Vanguard cannot be affected by Avenging Wrath or Divine Shield for 2.5 min.

sections.title: Searing Radiance
sections.bodyText: Senn channels the holy Light for 15 sec, inflicting 40793 Holy damage to all players every 1 sec.

sections.title: Sacred Shield
sections.bodyText: Senn shields herself, absorbing the next 6624120 damage and becoming immune to interrupt effects. She then charges into battle on her mighty elekk before casting Blinding Light .

sections.title: Elekk Charge
sections.bodyText: Senn charges forward on her mighty elekk, inflicting 155402 Physical damage to players in her path.

sections.title: Blinding Light
sections.bodyText: Senn emits a blinding flash of light, inflicting 378792 Holy damage to all players and disorienting them for 10 sec.

sections.title: Exorcism
sections.bodyText: Senn exorcises her current target, inflicting 252528 Holy damage.

sections.title: Divine Shield
sections.bodyText: The Vanguard member calls upon the Light to protect them, becoming immune to all damage and harmful effects for 8 sec.

sections.title: Forbearance
sections.bodyText: After using a powerful ability, members of the Vanguard cannot be affected by Avenging Wrath or Divine Shield for 2.5 min.

sections.title: Retribution
sections.bodyText: The Lightblinded Vanguard seek retribution for any of their allies slain in battle, increasing their damage done by 10% every 2 sec until they avenge their fallen ally or die trying.

name: Crown of the Cosmos
description: High atop the Voidspire, Xal'atath marshalls her dark army from across the Voidstorm. Aided by Turalyon, Arator, and Alleria, the mortals of Azeroth must confront her before she unleashes the might of the Voidspire against her enemies.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText:
Alleria Windrunner begins the fight held back by Undying Sentinels from the Void. She periodically strikes out at friend and foe alike with both Void effects and [Silverstrike Arrow]. 

When each of the Undying Sentinels have been destroyed, Alleria crashes into the platform and creates a Rift Simulacrum to assault her enemies with [Call of the Void] and [Ranger Captain's Mark].

When the Rift Simulacrum is shattered, Alleria releases her full Void abilities upon all players.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Silverstrike Arrow] will remove any Void effects from targets struck.
$bullet;Void Droplet will splash targets with [Corrupting Essence] when it dies.
$bullet;[Aspect of the End] reduces healing received until the target moves away from the arrow.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Silverstrike Arrow] will remove any Void effects from targets struck.
$bullet;[Null Corona] absorbs a large amount of healing and can be moved to another player when dispelled.
$bullet;[Aspect of the End] reduces healing received until the target moves away from the arrow.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Undying Sentinels utilize [Echoing Darkness] when no players are in melee combat.
$bullet;[Empowering Darkness] affects Alleria's allies within a large area.
$bullet;[Aspect of the End] reduces healing received and [Gravity Collapse] leaves the target weak to Physical attacks.

sections.title: Silver Residue

sections.title: Null Corona

name: Belo'ren, Child of Al'ar
description: One of the last clutch of Al'ar, Belo'ren was raised for the purpose of protecting the Isle of Quel'Danas. In the aftermath of the Voidspire, Belo'ren has been irradiated by Void. Confused and freshly hatched, the phoenix is focused on its sole task: Keep any invaders from reaching the Sunwell.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText:
Belo'ren guards the Sunwell with both Light and Void magic. His [Voidlight Convergence] infuses players with either Light or Void, protecting them from one while leaving them vulnerable to the other.

When his health is depleted, Belo'ren retreats into an ashen egg and begins to cast [Rebirth]. Players must damage Belo'ren to diminish his [Immortal Flame] before he is reborn anew.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Light Feather] reduces incoming Holy damage. [Void Feather] reduces incoming Shadow damage.
$bullet; Damage from [Light Dive] and [Void Dive] is split evenly between all players hit.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Light Feather] reduces incoming Holy damage. [Void Feather] reduces incoming Shadow damage.
$bullet; [Light Burn] and [Void Burn] absorb significant healing and inflict damage over time until fully healed.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Light Feather] reduces incoming Holy damage. [Void Feather] reduces incoming Shadow damage.
$bullet; Failing to hit a player with [Guardian's Edict] empowers Belo'ren, significantly increasing his damage.

sections.title: Stage One: Phoenix Reborn
sections.bodyText: Belo'ren ascends in his majestic phoenix form wielding the power of the radiant Light and devouring Void.

sections.title: Voidlight Convergence
sections.bodyText: Belo'ren takes hold of the Light and Void within, erupting for 135977 Twilight damage to all players every 1.5 sec for 6 sec and infusing players with a Light or Void feather.

sections.title: Light Feather
sections.bodyText: Infused with a luminous feather, reducing Holy damage taken by 50%.

sections.title: Void Feather
sections.bodyText: Infused with a darkened feather, reducing Shadow damage taken by 50%.

sections.title: Immortal Flame
sections.bodyText: Eternal flames fuel Belo'ren's energy, allowing him to use Rebirth when his health is fully depleted.

sections.title: Burning Heart
sections.bodyText: The flames within Belo'ren radiate intense heat, causing him to inflict 38850 Fire damage to all players every 3 sec.

sections.title: Embers of Belo'ren
sections.bodyText: Belo'ren summons Light or Void Embers that attack players.

sections.title: Light Dive
sections.bodyText: The ember focuses on a player for 8 sec, then dives into them inflicting 2331028 Holy damage split evenly among players within 12 yards, knocking them away and leaving behind a Light Patch .

sections.title: Light Patch
sections.bodyText: Lingering light energy inflicts 155402 Holy damage to players within every 1 sec and increases Holy damage they take by 150%.

sections.title: Light Blast
sections.bodyText: The ember blasts a random player, inflicting 77701 Holy damage.

sections.title: Light Eruption
sections.bodyText: The ember unleashes the radiant light within, inflicting 679883 Holy damage to all players. This spell can only be interrupted by players infused with a Light Feather .

sections.title: Rebirth
sections.bodyText: When an ember's health is depleted, they retreat into an ashen egg. If the egg is not killed within 15 sec a new ember hatches from the egg, inflicting 291378 Fire damage to all players.

sections.title: Void Dive
sections.bodyText: The ember focuses on a player for 8 sec, then dives into them inflicting 2331028 Shadow damage split evenly among players within 12 yards, knocking them away and leaving behind a Void Patch .

sections.title: Void Patch
sections.bodyText: Lingering void energy inflicts 155402 Shadow damage to players within every 1 sec and increases Shadow damage they take by 150%.

sections.title: Void Blast
sections.bodyText: The ember blasts a random player, inflicting 77701 Shadow damage.

sections.title: Void Eruption
sections.bodyText: The ember unleashes the devouring void within, inflicting 679883 Shadow damage to all players. This spell can only be interrupted by players infused with a Void Feather .

sections.title: Rebirth
sections.bodyText: When an ember's health is depleted, they retreat into an ashen egg. If the egg is not killed within 15 sec a new ember hatches from the egg, inflicting 291378 Fire damage to all players.

sections.title: Radiant Echoes
sections.bodyText: Belo'ren conjures echoes of concentrated Light and Void that drift across the arena for 50 sec.

sections.title: Light Echo
sections.bodyText: Bursts on contact with a player, inflicting 330229 Holy damage.

sections.title: Void Echo
sections.bodyText: Bursts on contact with a player, inflicting 330229 Shadow damage.

sections.title: Voidlight Rupture
sections.bodyText: Echoes react violently on contact with players infused with the opposing element, inflicting 971262 Twilight damage instantly and 466206 Twilight damage over 1 min.

sections.title: Guardian's Edict
sections.bodyText: Belo'ren performs a devastating combination of Light and Void attacks. Failing to attack a player or attacking a player that is infused with an opposing element empowers Belo'ren, increasing all damage done by 100% for 30 sec. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Light Edict
sections.bodyText: Belo'ren lashes out, inflicting 1942523 Holy damage and 777009 Physical damage to players in a cone in front of him and knocking them back.

sections.title: Void Edict
sections.bodyText: Belo'ren lashes out, inflicting 1942523 Shadow damage and 777009 Physical damage to players in a cone in front of him and knocking them back.

sections.title: Voidlight Edict
sections.bodyText: Belo'ren casts Light Edict and Void Edict simultaneously.

sections.title: Eternal Burns
sections.bodyText: Belo'ren burns players with searing Light and consuming Void, absorbing healing and periodically inflicting damage to the target until the burn is healed.

sections.title: Light Burn
sections.bodyText: Absorbs 331206 healing and inflicts 31080 Holy damage every 1 sec until the burn is fully healed.

sections.title: Void Burn
sections.bodyText: Absorbs 331206 healing and inflicts 31080 Shadow damage every 1 sec until the burn is fully healed.

sections.title: Infused Quills
sections.bodyText: Belo'ren periodically targets random players with Light or Void infused quills. The quills fire toward their targets after 6 sec, striking the first player in its path.

sections.title: Light Quill
sections.bodyText: Inflicts 582757 Holy damage.

sections.title: Void Quill
sections.bodyText: Inflicts 582757 Shadow damage.

sections.title: Death Drop
sections.bodyText: When Belo'ren's health is depleted, he soars sky-high and slams into the center of the arena inflicting 777009 Physical damage to all players and knocking them upward. Players farther from the impact location receive less damage and are not knocked up as high.

sections.title: Stage Two: Ashen Shell
sections.bodyText: As Belo'ren falls he retreats into an ashen egg and kindles the fire of rebirth.

sections.title: Rebirth
sections.bodyText: Belo'ren's ashen egg burns brightly, increasing the frequency of damage from Burning Heart by 50%. Damaging Belo'ren in this state diminishes his Immortal Flame , and depleting his energy prevents his rebirth entirely. After 30 sec, Belo'ren's rebirth is complete and he returns to battle players at full health.

sections.title: Ashen Benediction
sections.bodyText: Belo'ren's rebirth inflicts 194252 Fire damage to all players and reduces their healing done by 10%. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Incubation of Flames
sections.bodyText: Belo'ren periodically engulfs the arena in flames of Light and Void that erupt after 5 sec to inflict Holy or Shadow damage to players within them.

sections.title: Light Flames
sections.bodyText: Inflicts 466206 Holy damage. Players infused with opposing element also take 932411 Holy damage over 1 min. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Void Flames
sections.bodyText: Inflicts 466206 Shadow damage. Players infused with the opposing element also take 932411 Shadow damage over 1 min. This effect stacks.

name: Midnight Falls
description: Once a creature of Light, L'ura fell to the Void long ago on Argus, her essence siphoned by Alleria Windrunner in the Seat of the Triumvirate. Freed from her bindings, L'ura's dark energies now threaten the very Sunwell itself.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText:
The Dark Naaru counts down the minutes with each harrowing toll of [Death's Dirge] that echoes off the sacred walls. [Heaven's Glaives] rip and tear through the armies of light as L'ura conducts the infinite power held within [The Darkwell] to extinguish all that is holy.

When [Midnight] falls and Azeroth descends into darkness, brave [Torchbearers] emerge from the shadows to face [The Dark Archangel] and fight to see another sunrise.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Midnight Crystals undergo [Cosmic Fracture] if not destroyed in time.
$bullet;[Death's Dirge] displays [Dark Runes] that correspond to the melody's notes.
$bullet;[Torchbearers] emit light to protect nearby allies from [Midnight].

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Dimming] Dusk Crystals transform into Dawn Crystals upon reaching full health.
$bullet;[Death's Dirge] displays [Dark Runes] that correspond to the melody's notes.
$bullet;[Torchbearers] emit light to protect nearby allies from [Midnight].

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Heaven's Lance] inflicts massive damage as the target is [Impaled].
$bullet;[Death's Dirge] displays [Dark Runes] that correspond to the melody's notes.
$bullet;[Torchbearers] emit light to protect nearby allies from [Midnight].

sections.title: Stage One: Final Tolls
sections.bodyText: The clock ticks. The sun sets. The candle burns.

sections.title: The Darkwell
sections.bodyText: The Darkwell's colossal void beam instantly vaporizes any player that dares to enter.

sections.title: Dark Quasar
sections.bodyText: The Darkwell releases jets of excess void energy, inflicting 330229 Cosmic damage every 0.3 sec to players within them.

sections.title: Heaven's Glaives
sections.bodyText: L'ura spins and unleashes whirling blades that eviscerate players on contact, inflicting up to (116551 * 5) Cosmic damage. The blades ricochet through the chamber, inflicting reduced damage as they lose speed.

sections.title: Death's Dirge
sections.bodyText: L'ura sings a dreadful melody before marking players with a Dark Rune corresponding to each note. She then fires a sweeping laser, activating each Dark Rune hit.

sections.title: Dark Rune
sections.bodyText: Marked with a musical note, inflicting 19425 Cosmic damage every 1 sec. Upon activation, triggers either Resonance or Dissonance .

sections.title: Resonance
sections.bodyText: A Dark Rune hit in the correct order creates a transcendant toll, inflicting 135977 Cosmic damage to players within 3 yards.

sections.title: Dissonance
sections.bodyText: A Dark Rune hit out of order creates an echoing clamor, inflicting 252528 Cosmic damage to all players every 1 sec for 5 sec.

sections.title: Dissonance
sections.bodyText: A Dark Rune hit out of order creates an echoing clamor, silencing the target for 5 sec.

sections.title: Death's Dirge
sections.bodyText: L'ura sings a dreadful melody before marking players with a Dark Rune corresponding to each note. She then fires a sweeping laser, activating each Dark Rune hit.

sections.title: Dark Rune
sections.bodyText: Marked with a musical note, inflicting 19425 Cosmic damage every 1 sec. Upon activation, triggers either Resonance or Dissonance .

sections.title: Resonance
sections.bodyText: A Dark Rune hit in the correct order creates a transcendant toll, inflicting 135977 Cosmic damage to players within 3 yards.

sections.title: Dissonance

sections.title: Grim Symphony
sections.bodyText: It's time to face the music.

sections.title: Death's Dirge

sections.title: Dissonance

sections.title: Safeguard Prism

sections.title: Safeguard

sections.title: Disintegration

sections.bodyText: The crystal shatters into shrapnel, inflicting 372964 Cosmic damage to all players and an additional 186482 Cosmic damage every 1 sec for 10 sec.

sections.bodyText: True darkness suffocates any player forsaken within, reducing movement speed by 40% and inflicting 58276 Shadow damage every 1 sec. This effect stacks.

sections.bodyText: L'ura calls down dark stars, inflicting 1942523 Cosmic damage within 2.5 yards of each impact. The stars interconnect, inflicting 194252 Cosmic damage to players within the patterns.

sections.bodyText: L'ura transcends, diverging both players and her own being across two alternate dimensions. The violent division inflicts 213678 Cosmic damage to all players.

sections.title: Severed Surge
sections.bodyText: If either dimension is devoid of players, L'ura inflicts increasing Cosmic damage to all players every 1 sec.

sections.title: Dimension Breach
sections.bodyText: Collision between players in opposite realities causes a dimensional rupture, ending their existence.

sections.title: Dimension Link

name: The Hoardmonger
description: Driven by voracious greed, the gluttonous Hoardmonger fiercely defends the stashes of food and supplies he has stolen from nearby troll tribes. Nalorakk's first trial is to eliminate him before the tribes go hungry.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText:
The Hoardmonger prevents his reserves from being pilfered at all costs, casting [Resourceful Measures] upon reaching 90%, 60%, and 30% health, empowering one of his abilities.

Upon reaching 100 energy, he tosses [Spoiled Supplies] throughout the arena, growing Rotten Mushrooms for 12 seconds. Upon contact, these apply [Toxic Spores] destroying the fungi, preventing [Putrid Burst].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; Rotten Mushrooms apply [Toxic Spores] upon contact, preventing them from detonating in a [Putrid Burst].
$bullet; [Earthshatter Slam] and [Bonespike Slam] inflict massive damage in a frontal cone.
$bullet; [Ravenous Bellow] and [Hearty Bellow] inflicts high damage to all players.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Ravenous Bellow] and [Hearty Bellow] inflict high damage to all players.
$bullet; Rotten Mushrooms' [Toxic Spores] can be removed by Poison-cleansing effects.
$bullet; [Earthshatter Slam] and [Bonespike Slam] inflict massive damage in a frontal cone.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; The Hoardmonger gathers from the nearest resource pile during [Resourceful Measures].
$bullet; Rotten Mushrooms apply [Toxic Spores] upon contact, preventing them from detonating in a [Putrid Burst].
$bullet; [Ravenous Bellow] and [Hearty Bellow] inflict high damage to all players.

sections.title: Resourceful Measures
sections.bodyText: The Hoardmonger gathers from the nearest pile of resources, replacing one of his abilities with a new one.[][He can only retain one ability at a time.]

sections.title: Overflowing Supplies
sections.bodyText: Gathering from his pile of mushrooms, the Hoardmonger gains Overflowing Supplies . This effect increases the amount of Rotten Mushroom s thrown during Spoiled Supplies .

sections.title: Bonespike Slam
sections.bodyText: Gathering from his pile of bones, the Hoardmonger unlocks Bonespike Slam . The Hoardmonger slams the ground, inflicting 254225 Nature damage to players in a frontal cone. This additionally creates bone spikes for 45 sec which apply Bonespiked upon contact.

sections.title: Bonespiked
sections.bodyText: Broken bones litter the ground, inflicting 10169 Physical damage every 0.5 sec and reducing movement speed by 50%.

sections.title: Hearty Bellow
sections.bodyText: Gathering from his pile of meat, the Hoardmonger unlocks Hearty Bellow . The Hoardmonger lets out a mighty roar, inflicting 86437 Physical damage to all players and an additional 15254 Physical damage every 1 sec for 8 sec. Ignores armor.
