sections.title: Spoiled Supplies
sections.bodyText: The Hoardmonger reaches into his sack and tosses rotten food over 7 sec, impacting targeted players for 50845 Nature damage or littering Rotten Mushroom s around the arena.

sections.title: Rotten Mushroom
sections.bodyText:
This fungi grows for 12 seconds then detonates in a Putrid Burst, covering all players in Toxic Spores.

Upon contact, the spores transfer, applying Toxic Spores and destroying the fungi.

sections.title: Toxic Spores
sections.bodyText: Rotten Mushrooms apply a noxious cloud, inflicting 5085 Nature damage every 2 sec for 12 sec. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Putrid Burst
sections.bodyText: After 12 sec the mushroom bursts, inflicting 76268 Nature damage, applying Toxic Spores to all players.

sections.title: Earthshatter Slam
sections.bodyText: The Hoardmonger slams the ground, inflicting 254225 Nature damage to players in a frontal cone.

sections.title: Ravenous Bellow
sections.bodyText: The Hoardmonger lets out a mighty roar, inflicting 86437 Physical damage to all players. Ignores armor.

name: Sentinel of Winter
description: The seasons can be kind or cruel. Sentinel of Winter unleashes the harshest of winter storms to test all who face him. To surpass Nalorakk's second trial, endure the biting cold and defeat the embodiment of a winter storm.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText:
The Sentinel of Winter harnesses the power of the surrounding blizzard. This forms [Raging Squalls] which wander the landscape, and Fractured Shivercores which cast [Winter's Shroud] until defeated.

At 100 energy he coalesces a massive storm and channels [Eternal Winter] absorbing incoming damage, inflicting heavy damage, and pushing back players until broken.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Eternal Winter] inflicts heavy damage and pushes players back.
$bullet;[Raging Squalls] wander the landscape and inflict moderate damage.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Eternal Winter] inflicts heavy damage and pushes players back.
$bullet;[Glacial Torment] inflicts a large amount of damage, but can be removed by Magic-cleansing effects.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Eternal Winter] inflicts heavy damage and pushes players back.
$bullet;[Raging Squalls] wander the landscape and inflict moderate damage.

sections.title: Shattering Frostspike
sections.bodyText: The Sentinel of Winter slams the ice, forming 2 icicles which splinter, inflicting 203380 Frost damage to players within 4 yards of targeted locations, revealing a Fractured Shivercore.

sections.title: Winter's Shroud
sections.bodyText: The Fractured Shivercore blankets players with the chill of Winter, inflicting 50845 Frost damage to all players, increasing their Frost damage taken by 10% for 20 sec. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Snowdrift
sections.bodyText: Upon defeat, the Fractured Shivercore forms a pile of deep snow at its location. Players standing within have their movement speed reduced by 40% and are immune to forced movement effects.

sections.title: Shattering Frostspike
sections.bodyText: The Sentinel of Winter slams the ice, forming 2 icicles which splinter, inflicting 203380 Frost damage to players within 4 yards of targeted locations, revealing a Fractured Shivercore.

sections.title: Rimeshatter
sections.bodyText: The Fractured Shivercore bursts releasing ice shards that impact 6 sec later inflicting 30507 Frost damage to players within 5 yards. If no players are struck the shard fragments cause a Rime Detonation .

sections.title: Rime Detonation
sections.bodyText: Inflicts 40676 Frost damage to all players and roots them in place for 4 sec.

sections.title: Winter's Shroud
sections.bodyText: The Fractured Shivercore blankets players with the chill of Winter, inflicting 50845 Frost damage to all players, increasing their Frost damage taken by 10% for 20 sec. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Snowdrift
sections.bodyText: Upon defeat, the Fractured Shivercore forms a pile of deep snow at its location. Players standing within have their movement speed reduced by 40% and are immune to forced movement effects.

sections.title: Eternal Winter
sections.bodyText: The Sentinel of Winter manifests a massive storm, surrounding itself in a frozen veil absorbing damage equal to 13% of max health. Until broken, this storm inflicts 30507 Frost damage to all players every 1 sec, pushing them away.

sections.title: Raging Squall
sections.bodyText: The Sentinel of Winter creates Raging Squall s, inflicting 177958 Frost damage to players within 2 yards of the impact location. These squalls wander the arena for 1.5 min, inflicting 61014 Frost damage every 1 sec to players within 0 yards.

sections.title: Glacial Torment
sections.bodyText: The Sentinel of Winter assaults players with freezing temperatures, inflicting 40676 Frost damage every 2 sec for 16 sec.

name: Nalorakk
description: Slumbering in his fitful and battle-filled dream, Nalorakk, the Loa of War, will only test the mettle of the worthy. Survive his trial and receive his blessing or die trying.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText:
The Loa of War spares no mortal as the final trial, assailing players with [Echoing Maul] and pushing them with [Forceful Roar].

At 100 energy, Nalorakk casts [Fury of the War God], slamming Zul'jarra across the arena and incapacitating her with [Concussive Shock]. Nalorakk commands Echoes of Nalorakk to charge the defenseless Zul'jarra, casting [Echoing Fury] when colliding with the first target they encounter.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Fury of the War God] sends Echoes of Nalorakk to attack Zul'jarra, stopping only to cast [Echoing Fury] on the first target they encounter.
$bullet; Each Echo of Nalorakk casts [Echoing Maul] when Nalorakk casts [Echoing Maul].
$bullet; Nalorakk's [Forceful Roar] pushes all players away.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Overwhelming Onslaught] inflicts significant damage even while protected from Zul'jarra's [Defensive Stance].
$bullet; Each Echo of Nalorakk casts [Echoing Maul] when Nalorakk casts [Echoing Maul].
$bullet; Nalorakk's [Forceful Roar] pushes all players away.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; Zul'jarra's [Defensive Stance] greatly reduces Nalorakk's [Overwhelming Onslaught].
$bullet; [Fury of the War God] sends Echoes of Nalorakk to attack Zul'jarra, stopping only to cast [Echoing Fury] on the first target they encounter.
$bullet; Each Echo of Nalorakk casts [Echoing Maul] when Nalorakk casts [Echoing Maul].

sections.title: Fury of the War God
sections.bodyText: Nalorakk headbutts Zul'jarra into a Concussive Shock , then commands the Echoes of Nalorakk to charge her position. These collide with the first target encountered casting Echoing Fury . Any Echo of Nalorakk that reaches Zul'jarra triggers Demoralizing Scream . Each Echo remains for one additional Fury of the War God , then vanishes.

sections.title: Concussive Shock
sections.bodyText: Nalorakk disables Zul'jarra with a hefty blow. Unable to defend herself, she stands vulnerable to Nalorakk's echoes.

sections.title: Demoralizing Scream
sections.bodyText: Zul'jarra cries out in pain from the undefended attack, inflicting 76268 Sonic damage to all players. Players feel the weight of her burden, increasing damage taken by 10% for 30 sec. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Echoing Fury
sections.bodyText: The charging Echo of Nalorakk ravages the first target in their path, inflicting 50845 Nature damage.

sections.title: Fury of the War God
sections.bodyText: Nalorakk headbutts Zul'jarra into a Concussive Shock , then commands the Echoes of Nalorakk to charge her position. These collide with the first target encountered casting Echoing Fury . Any Echo of Nalorakk that reaches Zul'jarra triggers Demoralizing Scream . Each Echo remains for one additional Fury of the War God , then vanishes.

sections.title: Concussive Shock
sections.bodyText: Nalorakk disables Zul'jarra with a hefty blow. Unable to defend herself, she stands vulnerable to Nalorakk's echoes.

sections.title: Demoralizing Scream
sections.bodyText: Zul'jarra cries out in pain from the undefended attack, inflicting 76268 Sonic damage to all players. Players feel the weight of her burden, increasing damage taken by 10% for 30 sec. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Echoing Fury
sections.bodyText: The charging Echo of Nalorakk ravages the first target in their path, inflicting 50845 Nature damage.

sections.title: Echoing Maul
sections.bodyText: Nalorakk marks players for 4 sec, then sends an Echo of Nalorakk to their position. All Echoes of Nalorakk immediately inflict 101690 Nature damage to players within 8 yards.

sections.title: Spectral Slash
sections.bodyText: The echo slashes at nearby players, knocking them back and causing them to bleed for 15254 Physical damage every 2 sec for 20 sec. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Forceful Roar
sections.bodyText: Nalorakk's shout resonates throughout the den, inflicting 91522 Physical damage and pushes away players for 3 sec. Ignores armor.

sections.title: Overwhelming Onslaught
sections.bodyText: Nalorakk swipes repeatedly, obliterating his primary target for 4 sec, inflicting 203380 Physical damage every 1 sec and increasing Overwhelming Onslaught damage taken by 50% for 5 sec. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Defensive Stance
sections.bodyText: When Nalorakk casts Overwhelming Onslaught , Zul'jarra creates a protective barrier reducing damage taken from Overwhelming Onslaught by 50% to players behind her.

name: Arcanotron Custos
description: This highly advanced arcane construct has been charged with keeping the peace and ensuring that all Magisters adhere to rules and restrictions. Veering from said rules will not be tolerated.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText: Arcanotron Custos controls players with its [Ethereal Shackles] and by creating pools of [Arcane Residue]. Upon running out of energy, Arcanotron Custos begins its [Refueling Protocol], drawing in [Energy Orbs] to refuel itself.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Arcane Expulsion] inflicts a heavy amount of damage and knocks back all players.
$bullet;[Arcane Residue] inflicts heavy damage to players standing in the area.
$bullet; Arcanotron Custos gains [Arcane Empowerment] if an Energy Orb reaches it.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Ethereal Shackles] roots players and inflicts periodic damage.
$bullet;[Arcane Residue] inflicts heavy damage to players standing in the area.
$bullet; Arcanotron Custos gains [Arcane Empowerment] if an Energy Orb reaches it.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Repulsing Slam] inflicts a heavy amount of damage and knocks back its target.
$bullet;[Arcane Residue] inflicts heavy damage to players standing in the area.
$bullet; Arcanotron Custos gains [Arcane Empowerment] if an Energy Orb reaches it.

sections.title: Refueling Protocol
sections.bodyText: Upon running out of energy Arcanotron Custos begins recharging, drawing Energy Orbs toward itself and increasing damage taken by 20% for 20 sec.

sections.title: Energy Orb
sections.bodyText: [Arcanotron Custos attracts unstable Energy Orbs to itself, granting it Arcane Empowerment upon contact. If a player comes into contact with an Energy Orb it will be destroyed, creating a pool of Arcane Residue and covering the player with Unstable Energy .]

sections.title: Arcane Residue
sections.bodyText: Creates a pool of Arcane Residue inflicting 50845 Arcane damage every 1 sec and reducing the movement speed of players in the area by 50%.

sections.title: Unstable Energy
sections.bodyText: Inflicts 25423 Arcane damage every 1 second for 3 sec. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Arcane Empowerment
sections.bodyText: An Energy Orb refueling Arcanotron Custos creates an arcane explosion inflicting 101690 Arcane damage to all players and increasing the damage inflicted by Arcanotron Custos by 20%.

sections.title: Arcane Expulsion
sections.bodyText: Arcanotron Custos expels Arcane energy creating a pool of Arcane Residue at its feet, inflicting 76268 damage to all players and knocking them back.

sections.title: Arcane Residue
sections.bodyText: Creates a pool of Arcane Residue inflicting 50845 Arcane damage every 1 sec and reducing the movement speed of players in the area by 50%.

sections.title: Ethereal Shackles
sections.bodyText: Arcanotron Custos suppresses the movement of several players, inflicting 45761 Arcane damage every 3 sec and rooting them for 15 sec.

sections.title: Repulsing Slam
sections.bodyText: Arcanotron Custos strikes it's current target with destructive force inflicting 152535 Arcane damage and knocking them back.

name: Seranel Sunlash
description: An accomplished Spellbreaker, Serenel Sunlash has earned the full trust of the Magisters. Charged with the protection of the Cynosure of Twilight, Seranel will fulfill those duties with his very life if necessary.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText:
Seranel assaults players with [Suppression Zones] that cause [Feedback] to players affected by [Runic Mark].

Upon reaching 100 energy, Seranel causes an [Wave of Silence] silencing and pacifying players outside of [Suppression Zones].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Wave of Silence] inflicts heavy damage and silences players outside of [Suppression Zones].
$bullet;[Runic Mark] inflicts moderate damage to nearby players.
$bullet;[Suppression Zone] and [Feedback] silences and pacifies players.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Wave of Silence] inflicts heavy damage and silences players outside of [Suppression Zones].
$bullet;[Runic Mark] inflicts moderate damage to nearby players.
$bullet;[Suppression Zone] and [Feedback] silences and pacifies players.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Hastening Ward] increases Seranel's attack speed and causes his melee attacks to inflict additional Arcane damage.
$bullet;[Wave of Silence] inflicts heavy damage and silences players outside of [Suppression Zones].
$bullet;[Runic Mark] inflicts moderate damage to nearby players.

sections.title: Suppression Zone
sections.bodyText: Seranel slams his shield into the ground, inflicting 203380 Arcane damage to players within 8 yards and conjuring a Suppression Zone at the impact area. The Suppression Zone silences and pacifies players standing within and purges magical effects.

sections.title: Feedback
sections.bodyText: The Suppression Zone consumes Runic Mark from the target, causing them to emit a barrage of arcane missiles. Each missile inflicts 152535 Arcane damage to players within 3 yards of the impact area, silencing and pacifying them for 3 sec.

sections.title: Suppression Zone
sections.bodyText: Seranel slams his shield into the ground, inflicting 203380 Arcane damage to players within 8 yards and conjuring a Suppression Zone at the impact area. The Suppression Zone silences and pacifies players standing within and purges magical effects.

sections.title: Feedback
sections.bodyText: The Suppression Zone consumes Runic Mark from the target, causing them to emit a barrage of arcane missiles. Each missile inflicts 152535 Arcane damage to players within 3 yards of the impact area, silencing and pacifying them for 3 sec.

sections.title: Null Reaction
sections.bodyText: The Runic Mark violently reacts to the removal, inflicting 50845 Arcane damage to all players and reducing their movement speed by 25% for 3 sec. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Wave of Silence
sections.bodyText: Seranel readies a Wave of Silence , inflicting 76268 Arcane damage to all players and pacifying any player outside of the Suppression Zone for 8 sec.

sections.title: Runic Mark
sections.bodyText: Seranel hurls an Arcane infused glaive at a target inflicting (5085 + 25423) Arcane damage and an additional 25423 Arcane damage every 1 sec to players within 4 yards. The glaive bounces to 1 nearby players.

sections.title: Hastening Ward
sections.bodyText: Seranel surrounds himself in a hastening ward, increasing his attack speed by 100% and his auto attacks to inflict an additional 25423 Arcane damage for 15 sec.

name: Gemellus
description: An otherworldly spawn of Void origins, Gemellus seems to utilize the Void not only for its own protection, but to propigate and foster the development of its species as well.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText: At the start of the encounter and 50% remaining health, Gemellus uses [Triplicate] to create clones that drift around the arena. Gemellus and its clones are bound by a [Synaptic Nexus] and act as one.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Astral Grasp] pulls players towards their respective Gemellus.
$bullet;[Cosmic Sting] inflicts heavy damage and creates [Void Secretions].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Astral Grasp] pulls players towards their respective Gemellus.
$bullet;[Cosmic Sting] inflicts heavy damage and creates [Void Secretions].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Astral Grasp] pulls players towards their respective Gemellus.
$bullet;[Cosmic Sting] inflicts moderate damage and creates [Void Secretions] upon expiration.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Cosmic Sting] inflicts heavy damage and creates [Void Secretions].
$bullet;[Astral Grasp] pulls players towards their respective Gemellus.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Cosmic Sting] inflicts heavy damage and creates [Void Secretions].
$bullet;[Astral Grasp] pulls players towards their respective Gemellus.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Cosmic Sting] inflicts moderate damage and creates [Void Secretions] upon expiration.
$bullet;[Astral Grasp] pulls players towards their respective Gemellus.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Astral Grasp] pulls players towards their respective Gemellus.
$bullet;[Cosmic Sting] inflicts heavy damage and creates [Void Secretions].

sections.title: Triplicate
sections.bodyText: At the start of the encounter and upon reaching 50% remaining health Gemullus self replicates, creating 2 clones of itself.

sections.title: Synaptic Nexus
sections.bodyText: All Gemellus function as a collective, sharing health.

sections.title: Neural Link
sections.bodyText: Gemellus forms a neural link with a player, absorbing damage equal to 20% of its maximum health. The player they are linked to receives 20% more damage for 12 sec. Players who touch the Gemellus who linked with them before Neural Link expires disrupts the connection, removing Gemellus' damage absorb.

sections.title: Triplicate
sections.bodyText: At the start of the encounter and upon reaching 50% remaining health Gemullus self replicates, creating 2 clones of itself.

sections.title: Synaptic Nexus
sections.bodyText: All Gemellus function as a collective, sharing health.

sections.title: Astral Grasp
sections.bodyText: Gemellus channels a shadowy tendril at a player, inflicting 20338 Shadow damage every 1 sec and pulling the player towards them for 8 sec.

sections.title: Cosmic Radiation
sections.bodyText: Gemellus radiates players pulled within its grasp, inflicting 91521 Shadow damage every 1 sec.

sections.title: Cosmic Sting
sections.bodyText: Gemellus stings a player with Cosmic Void, inflicting 61014 Shadow damage and creating a pool of Void Secretions at their location. Inflicts an additional 25423 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 6 sec.

sections.title: Void Secretions
sections.bodyText: Cosmic Sting forms a pool of secretions, inflicting 76268 Shadow damage every 1 sec to players standing within.

name: Degentrius
description: A powerful creature of the Void, Degentrius has taken advantage of the opportunity inadvertently provided by Magister Umbric and launched an assault on the Terrace.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText: Degentrius leads the assault from atop Magisters' Terrace, commanding the platform with overwhelming Void magic. [Void Torrent] streams carve across the arena as they flow into Degentrius, while [Unstable Void Essence]s ricochet around the platform.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; If there are no players standing under [Unstable Void Essence]  when it impacts, damage will be inflicted to all players.
$bullet; [Void Torrent]  inflicts moderate damage and stuns any players that come into contact with it.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Devouring Entropy] creates Entropy Orbs upon removal.
$bullet; If there are no players standing under [Unstable Void Essence]  when it impacts, damage will be inflicted to all players.
$bullet; [Void Torrent]  inflicts moderate damage and stuns any players that come into contact with it.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Null Bomb] will inflict massive damage to all players if it is not triggered by a player.
$bullet; If there are no players standing under [Unstable Void Essence]  when it impacts, damage will be inflicted to all players.
$bullet; [Void Torrent]  inflicts moderate damage and stuns any players that come into contact with it.

sections.title: Void Torrent
sections.bodyText: The Celestial Orrery's focusing lenses channel Void energy into Degentrius. Contact with a Void Torrent inflicts 152419 Shadow damage and stuns the player for 5 sec.

sections.title: Unstable Void Essence
sections.bodyText: Degentrius launches unstable void energy that bounces to 4 locations, inflicting 50845 Shadow damage to any player at the point of impact. If no player is in the area the unstable void essence erupts in Void Destruction .

sections.title: Void Destruction
sections.bodyText: Void energy erupts upon impact with the ground inflicting 61014 Shadow damage to all players plus an additional 5085 Shadow damage every 0.5 sec for 40 sec. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Devouring Entropy
sections.bodyText: Degentrius corrupts several players with Void energy, inflicting 15246 Shadow damage every 1 sec. Each afflicted player receives a different duration. Upon expiration, Entropy Orb s launch from the player's location.

sections.title: Entropy Orb
sections.bodyText: Volatile masses inflict 76268 Shadow damage to players struck and additionaly reduce their movement speed by 70% for 5 sec.

sections.title: Hulking Fragment
sections.bodyText: Degentrius smashes a massive fragment into their current target, inflicting 177958 Shadow damage to players within 8 yards. The force of the impact knocks away other players within 8 yards of their target.

sections.title: Umbral Splinters
sections.bodyText: Embedded splinters from Hulking Fragment inflict 20338 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 30 sec. This effect stacks. Upon removal, the splinters dissolve, leaving behind Stygian Ichor .

sections.title: Stygian Ichor
sections.bodyText: The dissolved splinters form a pool on the ground for 40 sec, inflicting 10169 Shadow damage every 0.5 sec to players within.

sections.title: Entropy Blast
sections.bodyText: Degentrius unleashes an Entropy Blast at its primary target inflicting Physical damage.

name: Muro'jin and Nekraxx
description: Muro'jin is a relentless tracker, charged with capturing victims for the Vilebranch's dark rites. Nekraxx, a reanimated eagle, strikes down any who resist capture by her master. They must not be allowed to supply souls for Vordaza's necrotic magic any longer.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText:
The cunning duo of Muro'jin and Nekraxx fight as one, assailing players with an array of combined tactics.

Muro'jin withers players down with [Barrage] while Nekraxx flings a salvo of feathers with [Fetid Quillstorm].

As Muro'jin scatters [Freezing Traps] across the arena, Nekraxx barrels forward with [Carrion Swoop].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Muro'jin attempts to [Revive Pet] upon Nekraxx's defeat, and Nekraxx enters [Bestial Wrath] upon Muro'jin's defeat.
$bullet;Muro'jin's [Freezing Traps] encase players in ice upon contact. Players encased in ice can intercept Nekraxx's [Carrion Swoop].
$bullet;Muro'jin's [Barrage] follows the targeted player and affects all players in a frontal cone.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Nekraxx's [Infected Pinions] inflicts significant damage to all players.
$bullet;Muro'jin's [Freezing Traps] encase players in ice upon contact. Players encased in ice can intercept Nekraxx's [Carrion Swoop].
$bullet;Muro'jin's [Barrage] follows the targeted player and affects all players in a frontal cone.

sections.title: Tank
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Muro'jin's [Flanking Spear] both repositions behind his current target and applies [Open Wound].
$bullet;Muro'jin's [Freezing Traps] encase players in ice upon contact. Players encased in ice can intercept Nekraxx's [Carrion Swoop].
$bullet;Nekraxx's [Carrion Swoop] affects all players in its path, inflicting damage and knocking them upwards.

sections.title: Freezing Trap
sections.bodyText: Muro'jin throws traps at players which remain for 40 sec. Upon contact, these incapacitate the triggering player for 8 sec. Damage may break the effect.

sections.title: Freezing Trap
sections.bodyText: Muro'jin throws traps at players which remain for 40 sec. Upon contact, these incapacitate the triggering player for 8 sec. Damage may break the effect.

sections.title: Icy Slick
sections.bodyText: Triggered Freezing Trap s leave behind a frozen patch that inflicts 25423 Frost damage every 1 sec to players within and causes them to slide.

sections.title: Barrage
sections.bodyText: Muro'jin fixes his aim on a player for 5 sec, firing a spray of venomous arrows in a frontal cone toward them every 0.5 sec. The volley inflicts 20338 Plague damage to players struck and applies Vilebranch Sting .

sections.title: Vilebranch Sting
sections.bodyText: Muro'jin's venom-tipped arrows inhibit targets, reducing their movement speed by 5% for 10 sec. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Flanking Spear
sections.bodyText: Muro'jin harpoons behind his current target and hurls a massive spear. The spear inflicts 305070 Physical damage and knocks the target away, applying Open Wound .

sections.title: Open Wound
sections.bodyText: Muro'jin's Flanking Spear causes the target to bleed profusely, inflicting 40676 Physical damage every 1 sec for 10 sec.

sections.title: Revive Pet
sections.bodyText: Muro'jin revives Nekraxx, returning them to life with 35% of their health.

sections.title: Carrion Swoop
sections.bodyText: Nekraxx charges toward a marked player, inflicting 88979 Shadow damage to players in her path and knocking them upwards. If Nekraxx strikes a player incapacitated by Freezing Trap , the trap shatters instead, stunning Nekraxx for 5 sec.

sections.title: Carrion Swoop
sections.bodyText: Nekraxx charges toward a marked player, inflicting 88979 Shadow damage to players in her path and knocking them upwards. If Nekraxx strikes a player incapacitated by Freezing Trap , the trap shatters instead, stunning Nekraxx for 5 sec.

sections.title: Coordinated Assault
sections.bodyText: Muro'jin hurls an axe at players knocked up by Carrion Swoop , inflicting 254225 Physical damage and knocking them further upwards.

sections.title: Fetid Quillstorm
sections.bodyText: Nekraxx soars to a location and releases a surge of dark energy, inflicting 127113 Shadow damage to players within 10 yards and flinging quills which inflict 127113 Shadow damage to players within 3 yards.

sections.title: Infected Pinions
sections.bodyText: Nekraxx pierces all players with festering feathers, inflicting 12711 Plague damage every 1 sec for 30 sec.

sections.title: Bestial Wrath
sections.bodyText: Muro'jin's defeat sends Nekraxx into a frenzy, increasing her damage done by 20% every 4 sec. This effect stacks.

name: Vordaza
description: Vordaza, the Vilebranch's master of souls, performs forbidden rites to extract the soul essences of the dead. She distills the suffering of her victims into raw necrotic energy to empower Rak'tul, her monstrous creation. Her vile magic and her monster must be stopped.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText:
Vordaza blasts players with necrotic energy while manipulating spirits with [Wrest Phantoms] to perform her bidding.

As the fight progresses, Vordaza invokes a [Necrotic Convergence], concentrating soul energy into volatile masses until interrupted.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Vordaza summons Unstable Phantoms with [Wrest Phantoms] that chase players with [Final Pursuit].
$bullet;Unstable Phantoms afflict all players with [Lingering Dread] when defeated.
$bullet;While [Deathshroud] holds, Vordaza is unable to be interrupted.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Vordaza summons Unstable Phantoms with [Wrest Phantoms] that chase players with [Final Pursuit].
$bullet;Unstable Phantoms afflict all players with [Lingering Dread] when defeated.
$bullet;[Drain Soul] inflicts heavy damage to Vordaza's current target and absorbs healing received.

sections.title: Tank
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Vordaza summons Unstable Phantoms with [Wrest Phantoms] that chase players with [Final Pursuit].
$bullet;Unstable Phantoms afflict all players with [Lingering Dread] when defeated.
$bullet;[Drain Soul] inflicts heavy damage to Vordaza's current target and absorbs healing received.

sections.title: Necrotic Convergence
sections.bodyText: Vordaza protects herself with Deathshroud and unleashes waves of necrotic energy which inflict 22880 Shadow damage to all players every 2 sec for up to 1 min. This effect grows in intensity over time.

sections.title: Deathshroud
sections.bodyText: Vordaza wraps herself in a necrotic barrier, becoming immune to interrupt effects and absorbing the next 1009402 damage for 1 min.

sections.title: Coalesced Death
sections.bodyText: Vordaza's ritual forms masses of soul ichor that flow across the dais, inflicting 127113 Shadow damage to players struck.

sections.title: Wrest Phantoms
sections.bodyText: Vordaza wrests fresh sacrifices to do her bidding, manifesting Unstable Phantoms that seek out players.

sections.title: Final Pursuit
sections.bodyText: The phantom seeks out a player until defeated. When it reaches its target or collides with another Unstable Phantom, it bursts, inflicting 254225 Shadow damage to players within 3.5 yards.

sections.title: Haunting Remains
sections.bodyText: Final Pursuit's burst haunts players struck, increasing their damage taken from Final Pursuit by 200% for 20 sec.

sections.title: Soulrot
sections.bodyText: Upon defeat Unstable Phantoms leave behind a pool of necrotic residue for 20 sec, inflicting 50845 Shadow damage every 1.5 sec to players within.

sections.title: Lingering Dread
sections.bodyText: The phantom screams when slain, inflicting 25423 Shadow damage to all players.

sections.title: Veiled Presence
sections.bodyText: The phantom's incorporeal form reduces their damage taken by 99%, but causes them to lose 0% health every 1 sec.

sections.title: Veiled Presence
sections.bodyText: The phantom's incorporeal form reduces their damage taken by 99%, but causes them to lose 0% health every 1 sec.

sections.title: Unmake
sections.bodyText: Vordaza unleashes a frontal surge of soulflaying force for 4.5 sec, inflicting 61014 Shadow damage every 0.5 sec to players caught in the blast and pushing them away.

sections.title: Drain Soul
sections.bodyText: Vordaza siphons the life essence from her current target, inflicting 50845 Shadow damage and absorbing the next 26218 healing received every 1 sec for 4 sec.

sections.title: Withering Miasma
sections.bodyText: A withering miasma saturates the cavern, inflicting 13982 Shadow damage to all players every 2 sec.

name: Rak'tul, Vessel of Souls
description: An undead thrall bound to Vordaza, Rak'tul is grotesquely bloated with the essences of tormented souls and necrotic power. Drunk on his newfound power and driven mad by the souls' endless suffering, Rak'tul stands ready to break Zul'Aman beneath the crushing weight of his fists.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText:
Rak'tul batters players with [Spiritbreaker] and [Crush Souls], forming totems that [Soulbind] his foes.

As the fight progresses, Rak'tul unleashes a [Soulrending Roar], casting players' souls into the Restless Masses and afflicting them with [Withering Soul] until they return to the realm of the living.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Totems spawn at each [Crush Souls] target's location and cast [Soulbind] at a player.
$bullet;[Soulrending Roar] applies [Withering Soul] until players return to the realm of the living.
$bullet;Interrupting [Eternal Suffering] grants [Spectral Residue].

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Totems spawn at each [Crush Souls] target's location and cast [Soulbind] at a player.
$bullet;[Soulrending Roar] applies [Withering Soul] until players return to the realm of the living.
$bullet;[Deathgorged Vessel] inflicts heavy damage to all players.

sections.title: Tank
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Totems spawn at each [Crush Souls] target's location and cast [Soulbind] at a player.
$bullet;[Soulrending Roar] applies [Withering Soul] until players return to the realm of the living.
$bullet;[Spiritbreaker] inflicts heavy damage to Rak'tul's primary target, launching them into the air.

sections.title: Crush Souls
sections.bodyText: Rak'tul repeatedly leaps and slams down, inflicting 101690 Shadow damage to players within 5 yards. Each impact plants a Soulbind Totem.

sections.title: Soulbind
sections.bodyText: The totem ensnares a player, inflicting 10169 Shadow damage every 1 sec and pulling them toward the totem.

sections.title: Chill of Death
sections.bodyText: The totem inflicts 50845 Shadow damage every 0.5 sec to players within 0 yards.

sections.title: Spiritbreaker
sections.bodyText: Rak'tul pummels his target twice, inflicting 177958 Physical damage with each strike. He then delivers a final empowered blow, inflicting 139824 Shadow damage and launching the target high into the air. The final blow leaves behind a patch of Spectral Decay .

sections.title: Spectral Decay
sections.bodyText: The pooling essence inflicts 30507 Shadow damage every 1 sec to players within and increases their damage taken by 30%.

sections.title: Deathgorged Vessel
sections.bodyText: Rak'tul's engorged form releases soul energy every 6 sec, inflicting 54913 Shadow damage to all players and ejecting Volatile Essence s.

sections.title: Volatile Essence
sections.bodyText: Released soul energy bursts upon impact, inflicting 101690 Shadow damage to players within 2 yards.

sections.title: Soulrending Roar
sections.bodyText: Rak'tul roars with tremendous force, awakening the Restless Masses and applying Withering Soul to all players. This affliction tears players' souls asunder, flinging them across the Echoing Span and severing them from the realm of the living. Soul Expulsion leaves Rak'tul momentarily in a trance.

sections.title: Cries of the Fallen
sections.bodyText: The soul cries out upon contacting a player, inflicting 25423 Shadow damage and rooting them for 3 sec.

sections.title: Eternal Suffering
sections.bodyText: The soul radiates shadow magic, reducing the movement speed of players within 0 yards by 60%. Upon interruption, the soul dissipates, empowering all players with Spectral Residue .

sections.title: Spectral Residue
sections.bodyText: Released essence empowers players, increasing their movement speed by 25% and increasing their damage, healing, and absorption effects by 25% for 25 sec. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Withering Soul
sections.bodyText: While in an incorporeal form, the target suffers 2542 Shadow damage every 1 sec. This effect stacks every 4 sec. Returning to the realm of the living removes this effect.

sections.title: Soul Expulsion
sections.bodyText: Soulrending Roar sends Rak'tul into a stupor, stunning him for 45 sec. Souls periodically erupt from his form, inflicting 139824 Shadow damage to players within 4 yards of each impact.

sections.title: Shattered Totem
sections.bodyText: Rak'tul's roar shatters each remaining Soulbind Totem, inflicting 127113 Shadow damage to all players for each totem shattered.

name: Kystia Manaheart
description: Although an accomplished Magister, Kystia Manaheart was far too devoted to fel magic to give it up entirely. Little wonder she's become a staunch supporter and ally to underground fel smuggling operations in the Row.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText: Kystia Manaheart is accompanied by her pet mana wyrm Nibbles, who is controlled by [Illicit Infusion]. When this infusion is removed, Nibbles breaks free of Kystia's control and reverts back to her light form to assist players in battle with [Light Infusion].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; Kystia turns Nibbles hostile to players with [Illicit Infusion].
$bullet; Avoid Nibbles' [Fel Spray].
$bullet; Interrupt Kystia's [Mirror Images].

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; Kystia turns Nibbles hostile to players with [Illicit Infusion].
$bullet; Avoid Nibbles' [Fel Spray].
$bullet; Kystia inflicts heavy damage to all players while [Destabilized].

sections.title: Tank
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; Kystia turns Nibbles hostile to players with [Illicit Infusion].
$bullet; Avoid Nibbles' [Fel Spray].
$bullet; Interrupt Kystia's [Mirror Images].

sections.title: Illicit Infusion
sections.bodyText: Kystia infuses Nibbles with fel magic, turning her hostile to players while she is above 20% health.

sections.title: Felshield
sections.bodyText: Kystia enshrouds herself in a fel barrier, reducing the damage she takes by [abs(20 * 4)]%.

sections.title: Chaos Barrage
sections.bodyText: Kystia unleashes a devastating blast of chaos at her current target, dealing 152535 Chaos damage and then jumping to nearby players at reduced effectiveness.

sections.title: Fel Nova
sections.bodyText: Kystia teleports to a random player's location and sends out an explosive wave of destructive energy, inflicting 152535 Fire damage to nearby players and knocking them back.

sections.title: Mirror Images
sections.bodyText: Kystia creates copies of herself nearby, each of which cast Felstorm .

sections.title: Felstorm
sections.bodyText: Kystia's mirror image engulfs the arena in fel fire, inflicting 5085 Fire damage to all nearby players every 1 sec.

sections.title: Fel Spray
sections.bodyText: Nibbles unleashes a spray of fel magic in a cone in front of her, dealing 177958 Fire damage to players caught in the spray every 1 sec for 5 sec.

sections.title: Corroding Spittle
sections.bodyText: Nibbles spits at players, inflicting 30507 Fire damage immediately and 55930 Fire damage every 3 sec for 30 sec. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Light Infusion
sections.bodyText: When Nibbles is drained of fel magic she reverts to her light form. While in her light form, Nibbles attempts to purge the fel from Kystia with an infusion of light.

sections.title: Destabilized
sections.bodyText: The light infusion stuns Kystia for 15 sec, bringing her attacks to a halt, increasing all damage she takes by 100%, and expelling bursts of fel magic that inflict 30507 Chaos damage to all players every 1 sec. Additionally, this reduces the effectiveness of Kystia's Felshield .

name: Zaen Bladesorrow
description: Clever, quick-witted and commanding, Zaen Bladesorrow oversees the shipments of illegal fel artifacts. Those under his command follow his orders to the letter... or pay the price.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText: Zaen Bladesorrow demonstrates how this town got its name by occassionally casting [Murder in a Row] at all players. Dodge his deadly aim by taking cover to avoid heavy damage.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; At 100 energy, Zaen casts [Murder in a Row]. Get to cover!
$bullet; Avoid damage from [Same-Day Delivery] and [Fire Bomb].

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; At 100 energy, Zaen casts [Murder in a Row]. Get to cover!
$bullet; Avoid damage from [Same-Day Delivery] and [Fire Bomb].

sections.title: Tank
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; At 100 energy, Zaen casts [Murder in a Row]. Get to cover!
$bullet; Avoid damage from [Same-Day Delivery] and [Fire Bomb].
$bullet; Zaen inflicts heavy damage to his current target with [Envenom].

sections.title: Murder in a Row
sections.bodyText: Zaen takes a few precious moments to take aim at all players. When he is ready to fire, he shoots all players in his line of sight, inflicting 203380 Physical damage and an additional 457605 Bleed damage over 15 sec.

sections.title: Same-Day Delivery
sections.bodyText: Zaen calls upon the warehouse workers above to throw Forbidden Freight at players, causing 203380 Fire damage on impact and knocking them away.

sections.title: Forbidden Freight
sections.bodyText: A shipment meant to be kept hidden from prying eyes. Provides an excellent source of cover.

sections.title: Freight Explosion
sections.bodyText: Upon being hit by a Fire Bomb or Murder in a Row, Forbidden Freight explode after 5 sec, inflicting 152535 Fire damage to nearby players, knocking them away.

sections.title: Fel-Infused Freight
sections.bodyText: A shipment that is barely containing the volatile magic within, inflicting 20338 Fire damage to all players every 3 sec.

sections.title: Killing Spree
sections.bodyText: Zaen unleashes a rapid barrage of gunfire, inflicting 20338 Physical damage to all players every 0.5 sec over 3 sec.

sections.title: Fire Bomb
sections.bodyText: Zaen hurls a ticking bomb at a player. After 6 sec the bomb explodes, dealing 91521 Fire damage to players within 6 yards and destroying any Forbidden Freight caught in the blast.

sections.title: Envenom
sections.bodyText: Zaen drives a poisoned blade in deep at his current target, inflicting 228803 Physical damage and applying Heartstop Poison .

sections.title: Heartstop Poison
sections.bodyText: A lethal poison that reduces the target's maximum health by 30% and inflicts 533873 Nature damage over 15 sec.

name: Xathuux the Annihilator
description: Xathuux the Annihilator is one of Lithiel Cinderfury's most powerful summons. Although he loathes serving the warlock, he follows her commands for the sheer visceral joy of destruction.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText: Xathuux the Annihilator's rage increases until he erupts with [Demonic Rage] and gains [Burning Steps].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Burning Steps] leaves damaging pools of fel magic on the ground for a long duration.

$bullet;[Axe Toss] targets a random player and applies [Fel Lightning] to all players until the axe is destroyed.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Legion Strike] inflicts heavy Physical damage and reduces incoming healing.

$bullet;[Axe Toss] targets a random player and applies [Fel Lightning] to all players until the axe is destroyed.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Legion Strike] inflicts heavy Physical damage and reduces incoming healing.

$bullet;[Burning Steps] creates damaging pools of fel magic that expand from Xathuux the Annihilator's location and remain on the ground for a long duration.

sections.title: Demonic Rage
sections.bodyText: Xathuux the Annihilator flies into a Demonic Rage, inflicting 101690 Chaos damage to all players. While this effect is active, Xathuux gains 75% attack speed, suffers 30% increased incoming damage, and gains Burning Steps for 15 sec.

sections.title: Burning Steps
sections.bodyText: Xathuux the Annihilator spreads fel magic across the ground from his feet inflicting 55930 Fire damage every 1 sec to any players standing in it.

sections.title: Axe Toss
sections.bodyText: Xathuux the Annihilator throws his massive axe at the location of a random player inflicting 91521 Chaos damage and interrupting players within 10 yds of the impact. The axe remains on the ground emitting Fel Light until it is destroyed.

sections.title: Fel Lightning
sections.bodyText: Xathuux the Annihilator's axe channels beams of fel lightning at all players inflicting 2542 Chaos damage every 1 sec. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Legion Strike
sections.bodyText: Xathuux the Annihilator performs a powerful swing with his axe that inflicts 279648 Physical damage and reduces healing received by 80% for 8 sec.

name: Lithiel Cinderfury
description: Lithiel Cinderfury sees the Voidstorm above Silvermoon as both threat and opportunity. Her people are afraid, and she has a perfect solution... the power of fel. She claims her smuggling operation protects her people from the dangers above, but the profits she receives are a pleasing bonus.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText:
[Fingers of Gul'dan] will summon Wild Imps near every target.

After casting [Fingers of Gul'dan] Lithiel Cinderfury casts [Demonic Gateway] to escape and then begins casting [Malefic Wave].

[Malefic Wave]  slowly expands over a large area inflicts heavy damage along with lingering damage over time.

Players traveling through Lithiel's [Demonic Gateway] are immune to the initial impact and lingering Fire vulnerability from passing through [Malefic Wave].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Malefic Wave] grants [Malefic Empowerment] to any summoned demons still alive when it passes over them.

$bullet; [Chaos Bolt] inflicts high damage to a random target if not interrupted.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Chaos Bolt] inflicts high damage to a random target if not interrupted.

$bullet;Furious Vilefiend inflicts heavy damage.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Malefic Wave]  applies lingering damage over time when players using Lithiel's [Demonic Gateway] pass through [Malefic Wave].

$bullet;Furious Vilefiend inflicts heavy damage.

sections.title: Malefic Wave
sections.bodyText: Lithiel Cinderfury conjures a Felshield and then projects a wave of fel fire. Impacted players suffer 7627 Fire damage every 1 sec and take 50% additional fire damage for 1 min. This effect stacks. Demons struck by Malefic Wave are granted Malefic Empowerment .

sections.title: Malefic Empowerment
sections.bodyText: Empowered by Malefic Wave, increasing haste by 100%.

sections.title: Felshield
sections.bodyText: Lithiel enshrouds herself in a fel barrier, reducing the damage she takes by 50% for 10 sec.

sections.title: Demonic Gateway
sections.bodyText: Lithiel Cinderfury creates a demonic gateway between two locations. Activating the gateway transports the user to the other gateway and prevents initial damage and Fire vulnerability from Malefic Wave .

sections.title: Chaos Bolt
sections.bodyText: Lithiel Cinderfury unleashes a devastating blast inflicting 81352 Chaos damage.

sections.title: Fingers of Gul'dan
sections.bodyText: Lithiel Cinderfury calls down demonic magic to each nearby enemy inflicting 61014 Shadowflame damage to all enemies within 6 yds of each target. Wild Imps to burst from the impact sites and attack nearby targets.

sections.title: Felfire Burst
sections.bodyText: Inflicts Fire damage to an enemy.

sections.title: Summon Vilefiend
sections.bodyText: Lithiel summons a vilefiend that attacks players.

sections.title: Summon Infernal
sections.bodyText: Summons a slow but powerful Infernal that fixates onto players.

sections.title: Felfire Core
sections.bodyText: Inflicts 30507 Fire damage to nearby enemies every 2 sec.

sections.title: Searing Fel Flame
sections.bodyText: Lithiel Cinderfury engulfs herself in fel fire, radiating 15254 Fire damage to enemies every 1 sec.

name: Chief Corewright Kasreth
description: Chief Corewright Kasreth and the Shadowguard Ethereals once upheld flawless energy flow within the Nexus-Point's Corespark Engine. But Lothraxion's radiant disruption shattered their balance. Now, cloaked in mistrust and weary of outsiders, they labor to restore the arcane harmony that once sustained the Nexus-Point.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText: Kasreth's Corespark Engine ebbs and flows with arcane energies, forming [Leyline Arrays] between the conduits around the room. The Corewright is a mastermind of circuitry, overwhelming a player with [Reflux Charge]. At 100 energy, Kasreth picks up a corespark and overcharges it in the engine, unleashing a [Corespark Detonation] at the impact location.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Reflux Charge] inflicts damage until overloaded.
$bullet;[Leyline Arrays] link randomly between conduits around the room and inflict heavy damage when crossing.
$bullet;[Flux Collapse] launches a continuous flow of arcane towards a player.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Reflux Charge] inflicts damage until overloaded.
$bullet;[Leyline Arrays] link randomly between conduits around the room and inflict heavy damage when crossing.
$bullet;[Flux Collapse] launches a continuous flow of arcane towards a player.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Reflux Charge] inflicts damage until overloaded.
$bullet;[Leyline Arrays] link randomly between conduits around the room and inflict heavy damage when crossing.
$bullet;[Flux Collapse] launches a continuous flow of arcane towards a player.

sections.title: Leyline Array
sections.bodyText: A dangerous flow of Arcane power links between conduits inflicting 152535 Arcane damage when crossed and reducing their movement speed by 20% for 8 sec. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Corespark Detonation
sections.bodyText: Upon reaching 100 energy, Kasreth overcharges a spark in the core engine and launches it at a random location, inflicting 127113 Arcane damage to all players within 14 yards of the impact. The detonation causes a Flux Collapse , leaving behind Arcane Spill s, and Sparkburn clings to all players.

sections.title: Sparkburn
sections.bodyText: An arcane discharge clings to players absorbing the next 104873 healing and inflicts 15254 Arcane damage every 1 sec.

sections.title: Corespark Detonation
sections.bodyText: Upon reaching 100 energy, Kasreth overcharges a spark in the core engine and launches it at a random location, inflicting 127113 Arcane damage to all players within 14 yards of the impact. The detonation causes a Flux Collapse , leaving behind Arcane Spill s, and Sparkburn clings to all players.

sections.title: Sparkburn
sections.bodyText: An arcane discharge clings to players absorbing the next 104873 healing and inflicts 15254 Arcane damage every 1 sec.

sections.title: Reflux Charge
sections.bodyText: Kasreth hurls a refluxing circuit on a random player inflicting 25423 Arcane damage every 1 sec. Provides immunity while standing in Leyline Array as the circuit recoils and clears the effect, stunning the player for 1 sec.

sections.title: Flux Collapse
sections.bodyText: Broken pipes leak excess power, inflicting 50845 Arcane damage to enemies within 2.5 yards of the impact. Causes an Arcane Spill to form for 1.3 min.

sections.title: Arcane Spill
sections.bodyText: Residual arcane energy lingers on the ground, inflicting 61014 Arcane damage every 1 sec to players standing within.

sections.title: Arcane Zap
sections.bodyText: Kasreth zaps the player, inflicting 50845 Arcane damage.

name: Corewarden Nysarra
description: Corewarden Nysarra guards Nexus-Point Xenas with waning strength. Lightscarred by Lothraxion's assault, she broods in her wing, wounded and waiting. The Nullward stirs with battle, and her wrath sharpens for any who dare approach.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText: Scarred by her struggle with Lothraxion, Fractured Images continue to assault the Corewarden, erupting in bursts of [Lightscar Flare]. Nysarra calls upon the remnants of her shattered command to defend and suppress players while she slips through the shadows with [Eclipsing Step] and empowers her twin nullblades to unleash [Umbral Lash].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; Corewarden Nysarra calls to her subordinates to assist during battle.
$bullet;[Eclipsing Step] carves into nearby players in addition to the targeted victim.
$bullet;[Lightscar Flare] stuns as the Fractured Image strikes its target and the resulting wound surges with Holy energy, providing power to those standing within it.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; Corewarden Nysarra calls to her subordinates to assist during battle.
$bullet;[Eclipsing Step] carves into nearby players in addition to the targeted victim.
$bullet;[Lightscar Flare] stuns as the Fractured Image strikes its target and the resulting wound surges with Holy energy, providing power to those standing within it.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; Corewarden Nysarra calls to her subordinates to assist during battle.
$bullet;The power of [Umbral Lash] cleaves nearby players and applies [Void Gash].
$bullet;[Lightscar Flare] stuns as the Fractured Image strikes its target and the resulting wound surges with Holy energy, providing power to those standing within it.

sections.title: Lightscarred
sections.bodyText: Wounded by Lothraxion, Nysarra begins the encounter at 60% health. Fractured Images periodically tear into the arena, causing Lightscar Flare .

sections.title: Lightscar Flare
sections.bodyText: A fractured image of Lothraxion strikes at Nysarra, causing her wound to flare and stunning her for 18 sec. Players caught in the image's blast suffer 76228 Holy damage and are disoriented for 5 sec. Standing in the wound's flare increases the target's healing done by 30% and damage dealt to Nysarra by 300% but inflicts 35592 Holy damage every 1 sec until she recovers.

sections.title: Lightscar Flare
sections.bodyText: A fractured image of Lothraxion strikes at Nysarra, causing her wound to flare and stunning her for 18 sec. Players caught in the image's blast suffer 76228 Holy damage and are disoriented for 5 sec. Standing in the wound's flare increases the target's healing done by 30% and damage dealt to Nysarra by 300% but inflicts 35592 Holy damage every 1 sec until she recovers.

sections.title: Devour the Unworthy
sections.bodyText: Nyssara channels the void to consume any surviving subordinates, restoring her own strength every 0.5 sec for 5 sec and triggers a burst of void energy inflicting 76228 Shadow damage to all players.

sections.title: Null Vanguard
sections.bodyText: Remnants of Nysarra's shattered command rise to defend and suppress.

sections.title: Flailstorm
sections.bodyText: The Dreadflail fixates on a random enemy and spins their flails inflicting 15254 Shadow damage every 0.5 sec to enemies within 7 yards of the caster.

sections.title: Void Lash
sections.bodyText: The Dreadflail empowers its weapons, causing melee attacks to inflict 76268 Shadow damage in a cone in front of it for 8.3 sec.

sections.title: Nullify
sections.bodyText: The Grand Nullifier conjures a blast of void energy at the target, inflicting 203380 Shadow damage.

sections.title: Dusk Frights
sections.bodyText: The Grand Nullifier calls several frights to a void zone, fearing players within 5 yards of the impact for 5 sec.

sections.title: Umbral Lash
sections.bodyText: Nysarra leaps to her primary target and unleashes consecutive slashes on them, inflicting 76268 Shadow damage with every strike and causing Void Gash on the final one.

sections.title: Void Gash
sections.bodyText: Gashes the player, knocking them back and increasing all damage taken by 50% for 10 sec.

sections.title: Eclipsing Step
sections.bodyText: Nysarra slips into the shadows and strikes at random players, inflicting 61014 Shadow damage and additional 20338 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 8 sec to all players within 14 yards.

name: Lothraxion
description: Blinded by betrayal, Lothraxion storms the Nexus-Point alone. With its defenses shattered, he prepares to breach the Nexus Core, risking a chain eruption that could annihilate Silvermoon and ripple across Azeroth itself.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText: Fractured Images of Lothraxion linger with every [Brilliant Dispersion], haunting the battlefield. These images [Flicker] and slice at nearby enemies with [Mirrored Rend]. When he reaches full power, Lothraxion flickers into hiding amongst his images and attempts to overload the core with [Divine Guile].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Brilliant Dispersion] inflicts damage to all nearby players.
$bullet; Fractured Images unleash [Mirrored Rend] when standing too close.
$bullet; Lothraxion hides among his distorted images during [Divine Guile] until he is interrupted.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Brilliant Dispersion] targets several players and inflicts damage to all nearby players when reaching its targeted destination.
$bullet; Fractured Images unleash [Mirrored Rend] when standing too close.
$bullet; Lothraxian hides among his distorted images during [Divine Guile] until he is interrupted.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Searing Rend] inflicts heavy Physical damage and leaves behind [Radiant Scars].
$bullet; Fractured Images unleash [Mirrored Rend] when standing too close.
$bullet; Lothraxian hides among his distorted images during [Divine Guile] until he is interrupted.

sections.title: Divine Guile
sections.bodyText: Upon reaching 100 energy, Lothraxion disguises himself amongst his Fractured Images as they all channel light energy into the core, inflicting 35592 Holy damage every 2 sec until Lothraxion is interrupted.

sections.title: Core Exposure
sections.bodyText: Inflicts 76268 Holy damage to all players and increases Holy damage taken by 20% for 1 min.

sections.title: Brilliant Dispersion
sections.bodyText: Lothraxion unleashes radiant swarms toward several players, blasting players within 8 yards of the impact for 61014 Holy damage and searing an additional 20338 Holy damage every 1 sec for 6 sec. Fractured Images scatter, erupting with Mirrored Rend to enemies within 5 yards of their creation.

sections.title: Mirrored Rend
sections.bodyText: Coming in contact with a Fractured Image rends the target, knocking them away and inflicting 50845 Holy damage with an additional 10169 Holy damage every 1 sec. This effect stacks and leaves behind Radiant Scar s.

sections.title: Radiant Scar
sections.bodyText: A jagged brand of divine energy inflicts 50845 Holy damage every 1 sec to players within the area.

sections.title: Flicker
sections.bodyText: Fractured Images periodically flicker to new locations, inflicting 101690 Holy damage and knocking away players in its path.

sections.title: Searing Rend
sections.bodyText: Lothraxion lashes out with a precise, double-slash aimed at his current target, with each strike inflicting 127113 Physical damage and an additional 20338 Holy damage every 1 sec for 6 sec. Carves Radiant Scar s into the ground.

sections.title: Radiant Scar
sections.bodyText: A jagged brand of divine energy inflicts 50845 Holy damage every 1 sec to players within the area.

name: Lightblossom Trinity
description: The Lightbloom has suffered a terrible defeat, but like the rutaani it imbues, it changes. These Lightblossomed rutaani fanatically propagate their vicious and invasive garden.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText: The trio of Lightbloom rutaani work in tandem to sow and nurture a Lightblossom garden. Meittik creates [Fertile Loam] that is then planted by Lekshi's [Lightsower Dash]. Kezkitt rapidly germinates the flora with [Lightblossom Beam] until they burst in a [Lightbloom Overgrowth].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; Lightblossoms gain an increasing amount of [Light-Gorged] unless the rays of [Lightblossom Beam] are blocked.
$bullet; Damage taken is shared between the trio with [Thicket's Trinity].

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Lightbloom Overgrowth] inflicts higher damage based on applications of [Light-Gorged].
$bullet; [Thornblade] causes random players to bleed for high damage.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Lightbloom Overgrowth] inflicts higher damage based on applications of [Light-Gorged].
$bullet; [Thornblade] causes random players to bleed for high damage.
$bullet; [Bedrock Surge] inflicts periodic damage to all players.

sections.title: Tank
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Bedrock Slam] creates patches of [Fertile Loam] near the location of the target.
$bullet; Lightblossoms gain an increasing amount of [Light-Gorged] unless the rays of [Lightblossom Beam] are blocked.

sections.title: Thicket's Trinity
sections.bodyText: Meittik, Lekshi, and Kezkitt are bonded, causing them to share all damage taken.

sections.title: Bedrock Slam
sections.bodyText: Meittik strikes their primary target with immense force, inflicting 101690 Nature damage and 254225 Physical damage. The force of the impact ruptures nearby topsoil, creating patches of Fertile Loam .

sections.title: Fertile Loam
sections.bodyText: Unearthed subsoil slows players standing within the effect by 50% and inflicts 40676 Nature damage every 1 sec.

sections.title: Bedrock Slam
sections.bodyText: Meittik strikes their primary target with immense force, inflicting 101690 Nature damage and 254225 Physical damage. The force of the impact ruptures nearby topsoil, creating patches of Fertile Loam .

sections.title: Fertile Loam
sections.bodyText: Unearthed subsoil slows players standing within the effect by 50% and inflicts 40676 Nature damage every 1 sec.

sections.title: Bedrock Surge
sections.bodyText: The impact of Bedrock Slam causes an aftershock that inflicts 20338 Nature damage to all players every 1 sec for 8 sec.

sections.title: Lightsower Dash
sections.bodyText: Lekshi dashes between patches of Fertile Loam , inflicting 101690 Holy damage to players in their path and sowing a Lightblossom at each destination.

sections.title: Light-Gorged
sections.bodyText: The concentrated energy empowers the Lightblossom, increasing its damage inflicted by 50% with each application.

sections.title: Lightbloom Overgrowth
sections.bodyText: The fully cultivated Lightblossom surges with energy, inflicting 7627 Holy damage to all players every 1 sec for 8 sec. Devoid of nutrients, patches of Fertile Loam wither into Light-Scorched Earth .

sections.title: Light-Scorched Earth
sections.bodyText: The charred earth inflicts 50845 Holyfire damage every 1 sec to players standing within the effect.

sections.title: Thornblade
sections.bodyText: Lekshi ambushes a player and backstabs them, inflicting 50845 Nature damage and causing them to bleed for 20338 Physical damage every 2 sec for 8 sec.

sections.title: Thornblade
sections.bodyText: Lekshi ambushes a player and backstabs them, inflicting 50845 Nature damage and causing them to bleed for 20338 Physical damage every 2 sec for 8 sec.

sections.title: Fan Of Thorns
sections.bodyText: Lekshi unleashes a flurry of thorns, inflicting 101690 Nature damage to players within 15 yards of their location every 1 sec for 3 sec.

sections.title: Lightblossom Beam
sections.bodyText: Kezkitt channels a beam of light on each Lightblossom Seed, inflicting 40676 Holy damage every 2 sec to players standing in the effect. The powerful beam rapidly germinates the seed, applying stacks of Light-Gorged . After 10 sec, the blossom casts Lightbloom Overgrowth . Standing within the beam stifles the seed's growth and prevents applications of Light-Gorged .

sections.title: Light-Gorged
sections.bodyText: The concentrated energy empowers the Lightblossom, increasing its damage inflicted by 50% with each application.

sections.title: Lightbloom Overgrowth
sections.bodyText: The fully cultivated Lightblossom surges with energy, inflicting 7627 Holy damage to all players every 1 sec for 8 sec. Devoid of nutrients, patches of Fertile Loam wither into Light-Scorched Earth .

sections.title: Light-Scorched Earth
sections.bodyText: The charred earth inflicts 50845 Holyfire damage every 1 sec to players standing within the effect.

sections.title: Light Bolt
sections.bodyText: Kezkitt inflicts 61014 Holy damage to a player.

name: Ikuzz the Light Hunter
description: Ikuzz is a fearsome carnivore who once stalked prey throughout Harandar. Now the Light Hunter has succumbed to the overwhelming power of the Lightbloom, and his insatiable hunger serves its growth.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText: Ikuzz entangles players in [Bloodthorn Roots] to immobilize his prey. At 100 energy, he fixates on a player with a [Bloodthirsty Gaze] and attempts to [Incise] them.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Bloodthorn Roots] immobilize players until the roots are destroyed.
$bullet; Players targeted by [Bloodthirsty Gaze] will be [Incised] if Ikuzz reaches their location.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Bloodthorn Roots] immobilize players until the roots are destroyed.
$bullet; [Thorncaller Roar] channels Nature damage on all players.
$bullet; Players take a high amount of damage when [Incised].

sections.title: Tank
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Bloodthorn Roots] immobilize players until the roots are destroyed.
$bullet; Players targeted by [Bloodthirsty Gaze] will be [Incised] if Ikuzz reaches their location.

sections.title: Bloodthorn Roots
sections.bodyText: Roots entangle players, inflicting 30507 Nature damage and rooting them in place until destroyed.

sections.title: Bloodthirsty Gaze
sections.bodyText: Ikuzz fixates on a player, pursuing them for 10 sec. Upon reaching their target, Ikuzz will Incise them.

sections.title: Crushing Footfalls
sections.bodyText: While fixating on a target, Ikuzz's massive footfalls inflict 30441 Nature damage to players and crush any Bloodthorn Roots within 7 yards every 1 sec.

sections.title: Incise
sections.bodyText: Upon reaching its prey, Ikuzz chomps down on the player, causing them to bleed 101690 Physical damage every 1 sec for 3 sec.

sections.title: Crunched
sections.bodyText: The player is stunned for 5 sec after being chewed up and spit out.

sections.title: Verdant Stomp
sections.bodyText: Ikuzz stomps, inflicting 76268 Physical damage to all players and knocking them back. After 4 sec, Bloodthorn Roots emerge at players' locations.

sections.title: Verdant Stomp
sections.bodyText: Ikuzz stomps, inflicting 76268 Physical damage to all players and knocking them back. After 4 sec, Bloodthorn Roots emerge at players' locations.

sections.title: Thorncaller Roar
sections.bodyText: Ikuzz roars, inflicting 50845 Nature damage to all players while Bloodthorn Roots erupt around it every 2 sec for 6 sec.

sections.title: Lightcrazed Frenzy
sections.bodyText: Ikuzz fully absorbs the power of the Lightbloom, increasing its movement speed by 20% and causing it to pulse 20338 Holy damage every 2 sec.

name: Lightwarden Ruia
description: The once-respected Rootwarden Ruia could not defeat the Lightbloom on his own. His wounded pride led him to drawing power from the Lightbloom and using it to punish all others instead of aiding his allies.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText: Lightwaden Ruia unleashes his druidic power, shapeshifting between Moonkin and Bear forms. At 40% remaining health, he returns to Haranir form and channels [Spirits of the Vale], casting all his abilities in a rapid flurry.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Pulverizing Strikes] launches a cone of Physical damage at each target.
$bullet; [Lightfall] inflicts high damage to players within each impact.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Grievous Thrash] is only removed when the afflicted target reaches full health.
$bullet; [Pulverizing Strikes] launches a cone of Physical damage at each target.

sections.title: Tank
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; In Moonkin form, Ruia's melee attacks are replaced with [Warden's Wrath].
$bullet; [Pulverizing Strikes] launches a cone of Physical damage at each target.
$bullet; [Lightfall] inflicts high damage to players within each impact.

sections.title: Lightfire
sections.bodyText: Ruia shoots a beam of energy at a player, burning them for 33049 Radiant damage every 1 sec for 6 sec. Upon expiration, Lightfire Beams emerge at the afflicted player's location.

sections.title: Lightfire Beams
sections.bodyText: Standing within the beams inflicts 30507 Radiant damage every 1 sec and silences players for 6 sec.

sections.title: Lightfall
sections.bodyText: Ruia calls down waves of falling Light energy, inflicting 152535 Holy damage to players within 4 yards of the impact.

sections.title: Warden's Wrath
sections.bodyText: Ruia blasts his current target with a bolt of energy, inflicting 25423 Nature damage.

sections.title: Pulverizing Strikes
sections.bodyText: Ruia marks several targets and launches a wave of force toward each of them in a frontal cone every 2 sec for 6 sec. Each impact inflicts 76268 Physical damage to players within the effect and applies Pulverized .

sections.title: Pulverized
sections.bodyText: Upon being struck by Pulverizing Strikes , players take 100% increased damage from Pulverizing Strikes for 6 sec.

sections.title: Grievous Thrash
sections.bodyText: Ruia thrashes about, inflicting 81352 Physical damage to players and causing them to bleed an additional 20338 Physical damage every 1 sec for 20 sec or until fully healed. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Mangling Claws
sections.bodyText: While in Bear form, Lightwarden Ruia's melee attacks inflict 100%1 increased damage.

sections.title: Spirits of the Vale
sections.bodyText: Ruia calls upon the spirits, casting Lightfire , Lightfall , Pulverizing Strikes , and Grievous Thrash every 8 sec until he is defeated.

name: Ziekket
description: Born from the Lightbloom's epicenter, Ziekket was spawned and incubated by Light-infested rutaani to create an unstoppable engine of the Lightbloom's expansion.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText:
Ziekket will periodically [Awaken the Lightbloom], sprouting Lightspawn Lashers from the earth and awakening any [Dormant] ones.

Surging with the Light's power, Ziekket projects a [Concentrated Lightbeam] at players that annihilates flora and fauna alike.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Concentrated Lightbeam] vaporizes [Dormant] Lightspawn Lashers into [Lightsap].
$bullet; Touching globules of [Lightbloom's Essence] inflicts Holy damage while increasing damage and healing done.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Lightbloom's Essence] inflicts Holy damage to players, but increases damage and healing done.
$bullet; [Oozing Xylem] continually inflicts Holy damage to all players.

sections.title: Tank
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Thornspike] impales Ziekket's current target.
$bullet; [Awaken the Lightbloom] summons a thicket of vicious Lightspawn Lashers.

sections.title: Awaken the Lightbloom
sections.bodyText: Ziekket sows Light energy into the soil, sprouting Lightspawn Lashers and reawakening any that are Dormant . Lashers reawaken with Vicious Regrowth .

sections.title: Lightspore Shot
sections.bodyText: The lasher spews at a player, inflicting 30507 Holy damage.

sections.title: Dormant
sections.bodyText: Upon reaching 1% remaining health, Lightspawn Lashers submerge themselves back into the ground, becoming unable to move and immune to player effects.

sections.title: Vicious Regrowth
sections.bodyText: Lightspawn Lashers reawaken with renewed power, increasing their haste and damage done by 30%. This effect also makes them immune to interrupts and crowd controlling effects.

sections.title: Concentrated Lightbeam
sections.bodyText: Ziekket releases a powerful beam of Light energy, inflicting 25423 Holy damage every 0.5 sec to players within the effect. Any Dormant Lightspawn Lashers hit by the beam are instantly liquified into puddles of Lightsap .

sections.title: Lightsap
sections.bodyText: Viscous resin covers the ground, inflicting 81352 Holy damage every 2 sec to players standing within the effect and reducing their movement speed by 40%.

sections.title: Lightbloom's Essence
sections.bodyText: Ziekket draws out globules of Lightbloom energy from the earth that move toward him, triggering a Fluorescent Outburst upon reaching him. The orbs instead burst when touched by players, granting that player Lightbloom's Might .

sections.title: Fluorescent Outburst
sections.bodyText: Ziekket absorbs the Lightbloom's Essence , triggering a powerful reaction that inflicts 50845 Holy damage to all players. This effect grants Ziekket a Fluorescent Shield .

sections.title: Fluorescent Shield
sections.bodyText: Ziekket becomes enveloped in Light energy, absorbing the next 52436 damage taken and increasing his damage done by 10%. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Lightbloom's Might
sections.bodyText: Players briefly borrow the power of the Lightbloom, increasing damage and healing done by 10% while suffering 10169 Holy damage every 1 sec for 12 sec. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Thornspike
sections.bodyText: Ziekket impales the player with his spiked branch, inflicting 101690 Holy damage and knocking them back. The puncture wound causes the player to bleed an additional 30507 Physical damage every 1 sec for 10 sec.

sections.title: Oozing Xylem
sections.bodyText: Ziekket gorges on Light energy, inflicting 30507 Holy damage to all players every 3 sec.

name: Taz'Rah
description: The domanaar's prized champion, Taz'Rah, is forced to fight against his will. Taz'Rah demands his own death from every opponent, hoping each battle will finally end his suffering.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText:
Taz'Rah uses [Gather Shadows] to summon Ethereal Shades that perform [Nether Dash], damaging targets in a line in front of them.

While Taz'rah's [Dark Rift] is active, players are drawn towards it.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;The effect from [Dark Rift] pulls in all players toward it and inflicts very high damage to those who fall into its center.

$bullet;Taz'Rah uses [Gather Shadows] to summon Ethereal Shades that perform [Nether Dash], damaging targets in a line in front of them.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Nether Dash] strikes all players in a line and inflicts Shadow damage over a long duration.

$bullet;The effect from [Dark Rift] pulls all nearby enemy targets toward it and inflicts very high damage to any who get pulled into it.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Cosmic Spike] inflicts heavy Shadowstrike damage.

$bullet;The effect from [Dark Rift] pulls in all players toward it and inflicts very high damage to those who fall into its center.

sections.title: Dark Rift
sections.bodyText: Taz'Rah rips open a rift for 6 sec that pulls all players toward it, inflicting 29463  Shadow damage every 1 sec to them. Players who fall within the center of the rift suffer 91521 Shadow damage every 1 sec.

sections.title: Ethereal Shards
sections.bodyText: Taz'Rah projects two shards toward a player. Each shard detonates on the first player it impacts inflicting 81352 Shadow damage. If both shards impact the player, that player suffers an additional 1016900 Shadow damage.

sections.title: Gather Shadows
sections.bodyText: Taz'Rah teleports a short distance and summons Ethereal Shades to lash out at players.

sections.title: Nether Dash
sections.bodyText: The Ethereal Shade dashes through its target, inflicting 61014 Shadow damage and an additional 17796 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 25 sec to all players in a line.

sections.title: Cosmic Spike
sections.bodyText: Taz'Rah slashes his current target, inflicting 177958 Shadowstrike damage.

name: Atroxus
description: Imprisoned by Charonus, this starving behemoth is hoping for a new victim to sate his appetite. Atroxus's sheer size is almost as dangerous as the poison it spews.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText: Atroxus uses [Provoke Creeper] to call forth allies and assaults players with its powerful venoms using [Noxious Breath] and [Poison Splash] .

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Noxious Breath] inflicts high damage in front of Atroxus.

$bullet;[Provoke Creeper] calls forth a Toxic Creeper to attack players.

$bullet;Toxic Creepers created by [Provoke Creeper] fixate on random players.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Hulking Claw] inflicts high Nature damage to the primary target.

$bullet;[Noxious Breath] inflicts high damage in front of Atroxus.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Hulking Claw] inflicts high Nature damage to the primary target.

$bullet;[Sickening Bite] applies stacking vulnerability to Nature damage.

sections.title: Provoke Creeper
sections.bodyText: Atroxus agitates the surrounding pools, causing a Toxic Creeper to emerge and attack players.

sections.title: Fixate
sections.bodyText: The Toxic Creeper fixates upon a player.

sections.title: Toxic Aura
sections.bodyText: The Toxic Creeper radiates a toxic cloud that inflicts 12711 Nature damage every 0.5 sec to players within 100 yards.

sections.title: Sickening Bite
sections.bodyText: The Toxic Creeper bites a player, causing them to suffer 10% increased Nature damage for 5 min. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Poison Splash
sections.bodyText: Atroxus splashes poison around itself, inflicting 101690 Nature damage with an additional 30507 Nature damage every 1 sec for 5 sec to players struck. Each impact creates a poison pool for 1 min.

sections.title: Poison Pool
sections.bodyText: Atroxus's acidic venom inflicts 40676 Nature damage every 1 sec to players standing within it.

sections.title: Lingering Poison
sections.bodyText: Leaving a Poison Pool afflicts the player with a lingering poison, inflicting 25423 Nature damage every 1 sec for 5 sec.

sections.title: Noxious Breath
sections.bodyText: Atroxus breathes out Noxious Fumes in front of itself, inflicting 203380 Nature damage to players struck.

sections.title: Monstrous Stomp
sections.bodyText: Atroxus inflicts 91521  Physical damage to all players, knocking them back.

sections.title: Hulking Claw
sections.bodyText: Atroxus delivers a powerful blow to a player that inflicts 127113 Nature damage with an additional 35592 Nature damage every 1 sec for 10 sec.

name: Charonus
description: The overly confident and ostentatious owner of the Voidscar Arena, Charonus, is impressed by the fighting ability of Azerothians and demands them for his grand collection.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText: Charonus truly tests his prey to learn their limits. He attacks players using [Unstable Singularity] and creates [Gravitic Orbs] to hunt them down.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Unstable Singularity] inflicts Shadow damage and reduces the movement speed of players caught within it.

$bullet;[Gravitic Orbs] continually seek out players until collapsed by an [Unstable Singularity].

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Condensed Mass] inflicts high damage to all players.

$bullet;[Gravitic Orbs] continually seek out players until collapsed by an [Unstable Singularity].

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Unstable Singularity] inflicts Shadow damage and reduces the movement speed of players caught within it.
