$bullet;[Gravitic Orbs] continually seek out players until collapsed by an [Unstable Singularity].

sections.title: Gravitic Orbs
sections.bodyText: Charonus summons a seeking Gravitic Orb near each player. The orb afflicts target player with Condensed Mass every 1 sec. If the orb comes within 6 yards of an Unstable Singularity, its essence is torn apart and the orb is destroyed.

sections.title: Condensed Mass
sections.bodyText: Gravitic Orbs fixate a player, inflicting 2542 Shadow damage every 1 sec and reducing their movement speed by 3%. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Unstable Singularity
sections.bodyText: Charonus marks players and creates a gravity well at their location after 5.5 sec. Players within 12 yards of the well suffer 10169 Shadow damage every 1 sec and are slowly pulled toward the center. Players within 6 yards suffer an additional 50845  Shadow damage every 1 sec and have their movement speed reduced by 50%.

sections.title: Void Cascade
sections.bodyText: Charonus projects condensed cosmic power toward nearby players. Players coming into contact with this energy suffer 152535 Shadow damage and are knocked away.

sections.title: Cosmic Blast
sections.bodyText: Charonus releases a massive blast, knocking back all players and inflicting 81352 Shadow damage to them with an additional 7627 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 20 sec.

name: Emberdawn
description: Emberdawn settled in the gardens of Windrunner Spire after seeking a place to raise her young. Highly territorial, she guards her nest with a searing ferocity.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText: Emberdawn lights the winds aflame as she protects her nest. [Burning Gale] pushes players and lights [Ignited Embers], creating [Flaming Twisters] that sweep across the garden.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Flaming Updraft] leaves behind a [Ignited Embers] upon expiration.

$bullet;[Burning Gale] pushes players and causes [Ignited Embers] to create [Flaming Twisters].

sections.title: Healer
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Flaming Updraft] inflicts significant damage to afflicted players.

$bullet;[Burning Gale] pushes players and causes [Ignited Embers] to create [Flaming Twisters].

sections.title: Tank
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Emberdawn's [Searing Beak] inflicts heavy Physical damage followed by significant Fire damage over time.

$bullet;[Burning Gale] pushes players and causes [Ignited Embers] to create [Flaming Twisters].

sections.title: Burning Gale
sections.bodyText: Emberdawn conjures a flaming windstorm that inflicts 20338 Fire damage every 1 sec to all players and pushes them for 16 sec.

sections.title: Burning Gale
sections.bodyText: Emberdawn conjures a flaming windstorm that inflicts 20338 Fire damage every 1 sec to all players and pushes them for 16 sec.

sections.title: Fire Breath
sections.bodyText: Emberdawn breathes a cone of fire towards a player, inflicting 203380 Fire damage to players hit.

sections.title: Flaming Updraft
sections.bodyText: Emberdawn spits fire at a player, inflicting 25423 Fire damage every 1 sec for 6 sec. Upon expiration, the fire forms into a flaming patch that inflicts 76268 Fire damage every 1.5 sec to players within it. The patch's central updraft inflicts 127113 Fire damage to players who touch it, knocking them away.

sections.title: Ignited Embers
sections.bodyText: Fiery remains inflict 76268 Fire damage every 1.5 sec to players within. The patch's central updraft inflicts inflicts 127113 Fire damage to players who touch it, knocking them away.

sections.title: Flaming Twisters
sections.bodyText: Ignited Embers react to the winds from Burning Gale , ejecting fiery tornadoes that inflict 127113 Fire damage to players struck and stun players hit for 2 sec before tossing them away.

sections.title: Searing Beak
sections.bodyText: Emberdawn pecks her current target, inflicting 279648 Physical damage and an additional 50845 Fire damage every 1 sec for 8 sec.

name: Derelict Duo
description: The banshee Kalis and her loyal abomination Latch lead a group of fanatical followers of Sylvanas Windrunner. They've come to the Spire in search of relics with any resonant essence of the Dark Lady, willing to do anything to obtain them.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Latch's [Heaving Yank] interrupts and pulls in the first target it hits.
$bullet;Kalis's [Debilitating Shriek] continues to increase its Shadow damage until interrupted.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Latch's [Heaving Yank] interrupts and pulls in the first target it hits.
$bullet;Kalis's [Curse of Darkness] causes Dark Entities to fixate upon players.

sections.title: Healer
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Kalis's [Debilitating Shriek] continues to increase its Shadow damage until interrupted.
$bullet;Latch's [Heaving Yank] interrupts and pulls in the first target it hits.

sections.title: Tank
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Latch's [Bone Hack] inflicts significant Physical damage.
$bullet;Latch's [Heaving Yank] interrupts and pulls in the first target it hits.

sections.title: Broken Bond
sections.bodyText: When either Kalis or Latch falls in battle, the other becomes incensed, increasing their damage done by 50% every 5 sec.

sections.title: Debilitating Shriek
sections.bodyText: Kalis continually releases piercing shrieks, inflicting 25423 Shadow damage to all players every 2 sec and increasing their damage taken from Debilitating Shriek by 30% for 3 sec. This effect stacks. Latch's Heaving Yank interrupts this ability.

sections.title: Curse of Darkness
sections.bodyText: Kalis curses players, causing Dark Entities to fixate upon them for 12 sec.

sections.title: Shadowy
sections.bodyText: Incorporeal darkness reduces damage taken by 99%.

sections.title: Shadow Bolt
sections.bodyText: Kalis inflicts 61014 Shadow damage to a player.

sections.title: Heaving Yank
sections.bodyText: Latch throws a hook towards a player, pulling the first target hit to his location. If a player is struck, Latch follows up with Heaving Chop .

sections.title: Heaving Chop
sections.bodyText: Latch strikes the hooked player, inflicting 101690 Physical damage and stunning them for 4 sec.

sections.title: Splattering Spew
sections.bodyText: Latch spews bile onto players, inflicting 61014 Nature damage to players within 5 yards of each impact and applying Splattered . Gunk Splatter forms at the impact locations.

sections.title: Splattered
sections.bodyText: Latch's bile inflicts 12711 Nature damage to players hit every 1 sec for 10 sec.

sections.title: Gunk Splatter
sections.bodyText: Latch's bile coats the ground, inflicting 76268 Nature damage every 1.5 sec to players within it and increasing their damage taken from Splattering Spew by 100%.

sections.title: Gunk Splatter
sections.bodyText: Latch's bile coats the ground, inflicting 76268 Nature damage every 1.5 sec to players within it and increasing their damage taken from Splattering Spew by 100%.

sections.title: Bone Hack
sections.bodyText: Latch chops his primary target, inflicting 203380 Physical damage every 0.75 sec for 3 sec.

name: Commander Kroluk
description: Commander Kroluk once fought in the Second War, a conflict that ended the life of Alleria Windrunner's brother, Lirath. In her grief, Alleria slaughtered any Old Horde she could find. The vengeful spirits of those she defeated now haunt the Spire.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText:
Commander Kroluk crashes down on players with [Reckless Leap] and cuts them to pieces with [Rampage].

At 66% and 33% remaining health, Kroluk lets out a [Rallying Bellow] to summon a warparty.
Kroluk maintains [Shield Wall] until his warparty is defeated.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Rallying Bellow] summons a warparty to fight alongside Commander Kroluk.
$bullet;[Bladestorm] inflicts damage to all players within Commander Kroluk's path.

sections.title: Healer
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Rallying Bellow] summons a warparty to fight alongside Commander Kroluk.
$bullet;[Reckless Leap] inflicts damage to players within the impact location.

sections.title: Tank
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Rallying Bellow] summons a warparty to fight alongside Commander Kroluk.
$bullet;[Rampage] inflicts sustained damage to Commander Kroluk's current target.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Rallying Bellow] summons a warparty to fight alongside Commander Kroluk.
$bullet;[Bladestorm] inflicts damage to all players within Commander Kroluk's path.
$bullet;[Intimidating Shout] fears players who stand alone.

sections.title: Healer
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Rallying Bellow] summons a warparty to fight alongside Commander Kroluk.
$bullet;[Reckless Leap] inflicts damage to players within the impact location.
$bullet;[Intimidating Shout] fears players standing alone.

sections.title: Tank
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Rallying Bellow] summons a warparty to fight alongside Commander Kroluk.
$bullet;[Rampage] inflicts sustained damage to Commander Kroluk's current target.
$bullet;[Intimidating Shout] fears players standing alone.

sections.title: Rallying Bellow
sections.bodyText: Commander Kroluk unleashes a bloodthirsty warcry, inflicting 88979 Physical damage to all players and summoning a warparty to fight alongside him.

sections.title: Bladestorm
sections.bodyText: Commander Kroluk enters a battle-trance, fixating on a player and inflicting 76268 Physical damage every 1 sec to players within 7 yards. Commander Kroluk continues to Bladestorm until his warparty is defeated.

sections.title: Shield Wall
sections.bodyText: Commander Kroluk fortifies himself, reducing his damage taken by 99%.

sections.title: Throw Axe
sections.bodyText: The Spectral Axethrower throws an axe at a player, inflicting 40676 Physical damage and causing them to bleed for 15254 Physical damage every 1 sec for 6 sec.

sections.title: Intercepting Charge
sections.bodyText: The Haunting Grunt charges toward their current target and inflicts 61014 Physical damage.

sections.title: Rallying Bellow
sections.bodyText: Commander Kroluk unleashes a bloodthirsty warcry, inflicting 88979 Physical damage to all players and summoning a warparty to fight alongside him.

sections.title: Bladestorm
sections.bodyText: Commander Kroluk enters a battle-trance, fixating on a player and inflicting 76268 Physical damage every 1 sec to players within 7 yards. Commander Kroluk continues to Bladestorm until his warparty is defeated.

sections.title: Shield Wall
sections.bodyText: Commander Kroluk fortifies himself, reducing his damage taken by 99%.

sections.title: Intercepting Charge
sections.bodyText: The Haunting Grunt charges toward their current target and inflicts 61014 Physical damage.

sections.title: Throw Axe
sections.bodyText: The Spectral Axethrower throws an axe at a player, inflicting 40676 Physical damage and causing them to bleed for 15254 Physical damage every 1 sec for 6 sec.

sections.title: Chain Lightning
sections.bodyText: The Phantasmal Mystic sends lightning into a player, inflicting 61014 Nature damage. The lightning then jumps to the closest other player.

sections.title: Flame Nova
sections.bodyText: The Phantasmal Mystic unleashes a nova of flame, inflicting 76268 Fire damage to all players.

sections.title: Rampage
sections.bodyText: Commander Kroluk focuses his destructive urge on his current target, repeatedly thrashing them and inflicting 101690 Physical damage every 0.5 sec for 5 sec.

sections.title: Reckless Leap
sections.bodyText: Commander Kroluk recklessly leaps towards the furthest player, inflicting 76268 Physical damage and an additional 20338 Physical damage every 1 sec for 12 sec to players within 12 yards of the impact location. The force of the impact causes Falling Rubble .

sections.title: Falling Rubble
sections.bodyText: Falling debris rains from the ceiling, inflicting 152535 Nature damage to players within 4 yards of each impact location.

sections.title: Intimidating Shout
sections.bodyText: Commander Kroluk bellows an intimidating shout, causing players who stand alone to run in fear and suffer 50845 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 6 sec.

name: The Restless Heart
description: Born from the grief and wrath of the Windrunner family, the vengeful spirit of a once-proud Ranger-General haunts the halls of its abandoned ancestral home. Only by facing a worthy foe can it be laid to rest and finally know peace.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText:
The Restless Heart assails players with [Arrow Rain] before focusing its fury on a player with [Bolt Gale].

Upon reaching 100 energy, the Restless Heart fires a wind-infused arrow that creates an expanding ring of [Billowing Wind].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Turbulent Arrows] knock players into the air when touched, removing [Squall Leap].
$bullet;[Bullseye Windblast] creates an expanding ring of [Billowing Wind].
$bullet;[Gust Shot] destroys any [Storming Soulfonts] struck.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Turbulent Arrows] knock players into the air when touched, removing [Squall Leap].
$bullet;[Bullseye Windblast] creates an expanding ring of [Billowing Wind].
$bullet;[Bolt Gale] launches a continuous volley of arrows towards a player.

sections.title: Healer
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Bolt Gale] inflicts heavy damage to the targeted player.
$bullet;[Turbulent Arrows] knock players into the air when touched, removing [Squall Leap].
$bullet;[Gust Shot] destroys any [Storming Soulfonts] struck.

sections.title: Healer
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Bolt Gale] inflicts heavy damage to the targeted player.
$bullet;[Turbulent Arrows] knock players into the air when touched, removing [Squall Leap].
$bullet;[Bullseye Windblast] creates an expanding ring of [Billowing Wind].

sections.title: Tank
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Tempest Slash] knocks The Restless Heart's primary target away and briefly increases their Physical damage taken.
$bullet;[Turbulent Arrows] knock players into the air when touched, removing [Squall Leap].
$bullet;[Gust Shot] destroys any [Storming Soulfonts] struck.

sections.title: Tank
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Tempest Slash] knocks The Restless Heart's primary target away and briefly increases their Physical damage taken.
$bullet;[Turbulent Arrows] knock players into the air when touched, removing [Squall Leap].
$bullet;[Bullseye Windblast] creates an expanding ring of [Billowing Wind].

sections.title: Bullseye Windblast
sections.bodyText: The Restless Heart fires an arrow at a location in its chamber, inflicting 203380 Nature damage to players within 20 yards of impact and forming Billowing Wind .

sections.title: Billowing Wind
sections.bodyText: A ring of violent wind expands, inflicting 61014 Nature damage every 1 sec to players who touch it and stunning them for 4 sec.

sections.title: Arrow Rain
sections.bodyText: The Restless Heart shoots a rain of arrows, inflicting 127113 Nature damage to players within 3.5 yards of each impact and forming Turbulent Arrows .

sections.title: Turbulent Arrows
sections.bodyText: The windy arrow detonates upon contact with a player, inflicting 12711 Nature damage and knocking them upwards. The detonation removes Squall Leap , forming a Storming Soulfont .

sections.title: Arrow Rain
sections.bodyText: The Restless Heart shoots a rain of arrows, inflicting 127113 Nature damage to players within 3.5 yards of each impact and forming Turbulent Arrows .

sections.title: Turbulent Arrows
sections.bodyText: The windy arrow detonates upon contact with a player, inflicting 12711 Nature damage and knocking them upwards. The detonation removes Squall Leap , forming a Storming Soulfont .

sections.title: Storming Soulfont
sections.bodyText: A stormy spirit inflicts 76268 Nature damage to players standing within its storm pool every 1 sec. Gust Shot quells these spirits.

sections.title: Bolt Gale
sections.bodyText: The Restless Heart fires a salvo of arrows towards a player for 5 sec, inflicting 20338 Nature damage every 0.5 sec to players in a frontal cone.

sections.title: Tempest Slash
sections.bodyText: The Restless Heart knocks away its primary target, inflicting 330493 Physical damage and increasing their Physical damage taken by 40% for 10 sec. Afterward, The Restless Heart fires a Gust Shot .

sections.title: Gust Shot
sections.bodyText: The Restless Heart marks players with wind-infused arrows. After 6 sec, the arrows unleash a wind gust, inflicting 45761 Nature damage to players within 8 yards and an additional 13982 Nature damage every 1 sec for 8 sec. The wind gust destroys any Storming Soulfont hit.

sections.title: Squall Leap
sections.bodyText: Stormy energy lashes outward when the Restless Heart leaps, inflicting 45761 Nature damage to all players and an additional 11440 Nature damage every 1 sec. Contacting Turbulent Arrows removes this affliction.

name: Forgemaster Garfrost
description: Forgemaster Garfrost has forged saronite into some of the most deadly weapons of the Scourge. He fills the air with a sinster chill, and he loves nothing more than squashing foes with the ore he carries on his back.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText:
Forgemaster Garfrost [Throws Saronite] at players, then follows up with [Orebreaker]. Occasionally, he lets loose a mighty [Cryostomp], increasing [Siphoning Chill's] danger.

Upon reaching 100 energy, Garfrost activates a [Glacial Overload] from his closest forge.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Garfrost [Throws Saronite] at targeted players.
$bullet;Saronite ore offers protection from [Glacial Overload].

sections.title: Healer
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Cryostomp] increases the danger of [Siphoning Chill].
$bullet;Saronite ore offers protection from [Glacial Overload].

sections.title: Tank
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Orebreaker] does not stun its target if it strikes saronite ore.
$bullet;Saronite ore offers protection from [Glacial Overload].

sections.title: Glacial Overload
sections.bodyText: Garfrost's overloaded forge pulses cold for 3.5 sec, increasing all player's Frost damage taken by 75% every 0.5 sec for 14 sec. This effect stacks. Saronite ore protects players from this effect.

sections.title: Throw Saronite
sections.bodyText: Garfrost throws saronite ore at players, inflicting 76268 Physical damage to players within 10 yards of impact. The ore becomes Saronite Sludge and explodes into Ore Chunks when destroyed.

sections.title: Saronite Sludge
sections.bodyText: The smashed saronite oozes a harmful substance, inflicting 50845 Shadow damage to players within it.

sections.title: Ore Chunks
sections.bodyText: Chunks of saronite ore rain down, inflicting 152535 Physical damage to players within 4.75 yards of each impact.

sections.title: Cryostomp
sections.bodyText: The Forgemaster's stomp causes an icy reverberation, inflicting 63556 Physical damage to all players and sending out Cryoshards. This reverberation also destroys all saronite ore.

sections.title: Cryoshards
sections.bodyText: Shards of ice slam into players, increasing their Frost damage taken by 50% and slowing them by 15% for 12 sec.

sections.title: Orebreaker
sections.bodyText: Garfrost unleashes a devastating mace slam on players within 5 yards of his primary target, inflicting 355915 Physical damage and stunning them for 8 sec. If the slam strikes saronite ore, it no longer stuns, instead destroying the ore.

sections.title: Siphoning Chill
sections.bodyText: The Forgemaster's frozen core siphons heat from players, inflicting 19067 Frost damage to all players every 2 sec.

name: Ick and Krick
description: The diminutive necromancer Krick oversees the contruction of horrific constructs within the Pit of Saron. Krick wears his foes down with dark magic and then commands the ghastly Ick to rip them into pieces.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText:
Krick and his construct, Ick, battle players simultaneously. [Shades of Krick] channel [Shadowbind] while Ick attacks with [Plague Expulsion] and [Blight Smash].

Upon reaching 100 energy, Krick yells, "[Get 'Em, Ick!]," commanding his monstrous minion to attack specific players.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Shades of Krick] explode for significant damage if not defeated quickly.
$bullet;[Shadowbind] and [Death Bolt] inflict significant harm unless stopped.
$bullet;Krick's [Get 'Em, Ick!] compels Ick to fixate a player, ignoring others at all costs.

sections.title: Healer
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Shade Shift] inflicts significant damage to all players.
$bullet;[Shades of Krick] channel [Shadowbind], inflicting intense periodic damage.
$bullet;Krick's [Get 'Em, Ick!] compels Ick to fixate a player, ignoring others at all costs.

sections.title: Tank
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Ick's [Blight Smash] inflicts significant damage to his primary target.
$bullet;[Shadowbind] and [Death Bolt] inflict significant harm unless stopped.
$bullet;[Shades of Krick] explode for significant damage if not defeated quickly.

sections.title: Necrolink
sections.bodyText: Krick connects his life force with Ick to enhance his control, causing both to share all damage taken.

sections.title: Get 'Em, Ick!
sections.bodyText: Krick teleports atop Ick, compelling Ick to enter a Lumbering Fixation .

sections.title: Lumbering Fixation
sections.bodyText: Ick fixates on a player for 5 sec, increasing his attack speed by 100% and ignoring other players at all costs. While fixating, he splatters Blight and launches Plague Globs . Ick periodically changes which player he fixates upon.

sections.title: Blight
sections.bodyText: Ick's blight pools inflict 76268 Nature damage every 1 sec.

sections.title: Plague Globs
sections.bodyText: Globules of necrotic filth impact the ground, inflicting 127113 Nature damage to players within 3 yards and forming Blight .

sections.title: Blight
sections.bodyText: Ick's blight pools inflict 76268 Nature damage every 1 sec.

sections.title: Shade Shift
sections.bodyText: Krick releases a burst of dark energy and teleports to a ritual circle. This burst inflicts 40676 Shadow damage to all players and an additional 10169 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 12 sec. This ritual summons Shades of Krick nearby.

sections.title: Shadowbind
sections.bodyText: Krick's shade channels dark magic into a player, inflicting 24660 Shadow damage every 1 sec and slowing their movement speed by 35%.

sections.title: Shade Bomb
sections.bodyText: Krick's shade explodes after 1 min, destroying itself. This inflicts 254225 Shadow damage to all players and an additional 50845 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 10 sec. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Death Bolt
sections.bodyText: Krick fires a massive shadow bolt at a player that inflicts 183042 Shadow damage.

sections.title: Shadow Lance
sections.bodyText: While riding atop Ick, Krick throws dark energy at a player that inflicts 30507 Shadow damage.

sections.title: Plague Expulsion
sections.bodyText: Ick disgorges a wave of necrotic filth, inflicting 61014 Nature damage to all players and launching Plague Globs towards them.

sections.title: Plague Globs
sections.bodyText: Globules of necrotic filth impact the ground, inflicting 127113 Nature damage to players within 3 yards and forming Blight .

sections.title: Blight
sections.bodyText: Ick's blight pools inflict 76268 Nature damage every 1 sec.

sections.title: Blight Smash
sections.bodyText: Ick smashes his target, inflicting 279648 Physical damage and forming Blight .

sections.title: Blight
sections.bodyText: Ick's blight pools inflict 76268 Nature damage every 1 sec.

name: Scourgelord Tyrannus
description: The death knight Tyrannus was promoted to Scourgelord after slaying the giant Garfrost. His power and ruthlessness alongside his frost wyrm, Rimefang, make him the perfect guardian for the Pit of Saron and the entrance to the Halls of Reflection.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText:
Scourgelord Tyrannus opens his assault with [Bone Infusion] while his dragon, Rimefang, attacks from the air with [Rime Blast]. While building his power, Scourgelord Tyrannus unleashes [Death's Grasp] and [Scourgelord's Brand].

Upon reaching 100 energy, he raises undead minions with [Army of the Dead].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Scourgelord Tyrannus's [Army of the Dead] summons a swarm of minions.
$bullet;Rimefang's [Rime Blast] freezes any [Bone Piles] it impacts.
$bullet;Scourgelord Tyrannus's [Death's Grasp] and Rimefang's [Ice Barrage] inflict significant damage at targeted locations.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Scourgelord Tyrannus's [Army of the Dead] summons a swarm of minions.
$bullet;Rimefang's [Rime Blast] freezes any [Bone Piles] or [Infused Bone Piles] it impacts.
$bullet;Scourgelord Tyrannus's [Bone Infusion] empowers some [Bone Piles].

sections.title: Healer
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Bone Infusion], [Rime Blast], and [Frost Spit] inflict significant damage to players.
$bullet;Rimefang's [Rime Blast] freezes any [Bone Piles] it impacts.
$bullet;Scourgelord Tyrannus's [Army of the Dead] summons minions that inflict significant damage to players.

sections.title: Healer
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Bone Infusion], [Rime Blast], and [Frost Spit] inflict significant damage to players.
$bullet;Rimefang's [Rime Blast] freezes any [Bone Piles] or [Infused Bone Piles] it impacts.
$bullet;Scourgelord Tyrannus's [Army of the Dead] summons minions that inflict significant damage to players.

sections.title: Tank
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Scourgelord's Brand] increases the damage of [Scourgelord's Reckoning].
$bullet;Scourgelord Tyrannus's [Army of the Dead] summons a swarm of minions.
$bullet;Scourgelord Tyrannus's [Death's Grasp] and Rimefang's [Ice Barrage] inflict significant damage at targeted locations.

sections.title: Tank
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Scourgelord's Brand] increases the damage of [Scourgelord's Reckoning].
$bullet;Scourgelord Tyrannus's [Army of the Dead] summons a swarm of minions.
$bullet;Scourgelord Tyrannus's [Bone Infusion] empowers some [Bone Piles].

sections.title: Bone Infusion
sections.bodyText: Scourgelord Tyrannus stomps necrotic energy into the ground, turning some Bone Piles into Infused Bone Piles . The stomp inflicts 40676 Shadow damage to all players and an additional 15254 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 8 sec.

sections.title: Bone Infusion
sections.bodyText: Scourgelord Tyrannus stomps necrotic energy into the ground, turning some Bone Piles into Infused Bone Piles . The stomp inflicts 40676 Shadow damage to all players and an additional 15254 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 8 sec.

sections.title: Bone Piles
sections.bodyText: Unfrozen bone piles produce Rotlings when Scourgelord Tyrannus summons an Army of the Dead .

sections.title: Rotting Strikes
sections.bodyText: The Rotling rots its primary target with each melee strike, reducing their maximum health by (1 / 2)% for 3 sec. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Infused Bone Piles
sections.bodyText: Unfrozen infused bone piles produce Scourge Plaguespreaders when Scourgelord Tyrannus summons an Army of the Dead .

sections.title: Festering Pulse
sections.bodyText: The Scourge Plaguespreader's decaying presence inflicts 31778 Nature damage to all players every 2 sec.

sections.title: Plague Bolt
sections.bodyText: The Scourge Plaguespreader hurls putrid magic at a player that inflicts 61014 Nature damage.

sections.title: Army of the Dead
sections.bodyText: Scourgelord Tyrannus raises Rotlings from Bone Piles and Scourge Plaguespreaders from Infused Bone Piles .

sections.title: Bone Piles
sections.bodyText: Unfrozen bone piles produce Rotlings when Scourgelord Tyrannus summons an Army of the Dead .

sections.title: Rotting Strikes
sections.bodyText: The Rotling rots its primary target with each melee strike, reducing their maximum health by (1 / 2)% for 3 sec. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Army of the Dead
sections.bodyText: Scourgelord Tyrannus raises Rotlings from Bone Piles and Scourge Plaguespreaders from Infused Bone Piles .

sections.title: Death's Grasp
sections.bodyText: Hands of the dead emerge at the location of players, inflicting 152535 Shadow damage to players within 6 yards and slowing them by 40% for 3 sec.

sections.title: Scourgelord's Brand
sections.bodyText: Tyrannus knocks away his primary target with a powerful slash, branding them. This brand increases Shadow damage taken by 200% for 6 sec. Afterward, Tyrannus casts Scourgelord's Reckoning .

sections.title: Scourgelord's Reckoning
sections.bodyText: Tyrannus leaps at his primary target's location, delivering a heaving necrotic strike. This maneuver impacts players within 10 yards of the landing zone, inflicting 50845 Physical damage and 152535 Shadow damage.

sections.title: Rime Blast
sections.bodyText: Rimefang blasts a player with ice, inflicting 61014 Frost damage to players within 6 yards and applying Frostbite . Any Bone Piles or Infused Bone Piles within the radius become frozen, preventing them from producing undead minions.

sections.title: Frostbite
sections.bodyText: Rimefang chills his victim to the bone, inflicting 15254 Frost damage every 1 sec for 8 sec.

sections.title: Ice Barrage
sections.bodyText: Rimefang spits icy chunks towards players for 4.5 sec, inflicting 152535 Frost damage to players within 6 yards of each impact.

sections.title: Frost Spit
sections.bodyText: Rimefang spits frost at a player that inflicts 27965 Frost damage.

name: Zuraal the Ascended
description: Zuraal represents the Shadowguard's first success at creating a void-infused Broken whose mind has not fallen into madness. A renowned brawler in his past life, Zuraal uses his newfound dark strength to empower his attacks and decimate his foes.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText: Zuraal uses the void to empower himself and injure his opponents. [Decimate] creates pools of damaging void energy, while [Coalesced Void] empowers all of Zuraal's abilities.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Oozing Slam] causes [Coalesced Void] to spawn, which erupts in a [Dark Expulsion] when they reach Zuraal.
$bullet; [Decimate] leaves behind [Void Sludge] in its impact area.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Oozing Slam] causes [Coalesced Void] to spawn, which erupts in a [Dark Expulsion] when they reach Zuraal.
$bullet; [Decimate] leaves behind [Void Sludge] in its impact area.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Void Slash] inflicts heavy Physical and Shadow damage.
$bullet; [Oozing Slam] causes [Coalesced Void] to spawn, which erupts in a [Dark Expulsion] when they reach Zuraal.

sections.title: Crashing Void
sections.bodyText: Upon reaching 100 energy, Zuraal begins to gather void energy around himself, pulling all players and Coalesced Void in. Zuraal unleashes the gathered void energy after 5 sec, inflicting 101690 Shadow damage to all players and knocking them back.

sections.title: Oozing Slam
sections.bodyText: Zuraal slams the ground with void energy, inflicting 61014 Shadow damage to all players and inflicting additional 20338 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 6 sec. The slam also spawns Coalesced Void in nearby locations.

sections.title: Dark Expulsion
sections.bodyText: Explodes in a shower of void energy, inflicting 111859 Shadow to all enemies and additional 30507 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 10 sec.

sections.title: Oozing Slam
sections.bodyText: Zuraal slams the ground with void energy, inflicting 61014 Shadow damage to all players and inflicting additional 20338 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 6 sec. The slam also spawns Coalesced Void in nearby locations.

sections.title: Umbral Ejection
sections.bodyText: When the Coalesced Void is killed, it leaves behind a pool of Void Sludge at its location.

sections.title: Void Sludge
sections.bodyText: A pool of volatile void that inflicts 50900 Shadow damage every 1 sec.

sections.title: Dark Expulsion
sections.bodyText: Explodes in a shower of void energy, inflicting 111859 Shadow to all enemies and additional 30507 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 10 sec.

sections.title: Decimate
sections.bodyText: Zuraal infuses his fist with void energy and lashes out, inflicting 81352 Shadow damage to their target and creating a pool of Void Sludge at their location.

sections.title: Void Sludge
sections.bodyText: A pool of volatile void that inflicts 50900 Shadow damage every 1 sec.

sections.title: Null Palm
sections.bodyText: Zuraal releases a cresting wave of chaotic magic, inflicting 203380 Shadow damage to all players in front of himself.

sections.title: Void Slash
sections.bodyText: Zuraal unleashes three powerful swipes at his target, inflicting 152535  Physical damage twice with another final strike inflicting 127113 Shadow damage.

name: Saprish
description: The ever-tactical Saprish deploys the forces of the Shadowguard with calculated precision. Though a skilled commander and strategist, Saprish relishes taking a direct hand in battle. He turns his foes' weaknesses against them, leaving his vulnerable adversaries at the mercy of his voracious pets.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText:
Saprish cover the battlefield with[Void Bomb] and rushes players with [Phase Dash].

At 100 energy, Saprish casts [Overload] that ignites all [Void Bomb].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; Saprish's [Phase Dash] causes an [Umbral Nova] when dashing through a [Void Bomb].
$bullet; [Overload] causes all the [Void Bombs] to explode, afflicting all players with [Seeping Void].

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; Saprish's [Phase Dash] causes an [Umbral Nova] when dashing through a [Void Bomb].
$bullet; [Overload] causes all the [Void Bombs] to explode, afflicting all players with [Seeping Void].

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Rending Void] inflicts Shadow damage on all melee strikes.
$bullet; [Overload] causes all the [Void Bombs] to explode, afflicting all players with [Seeping Void].

sections.title: Void Bomb
sections.bodyText: Saprish throws void bombs at nearby player locations. Upon contact with a player, the bomb explodes and inflicts 61014 Shadow damage to players within 5 yards and additional 15254 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 15 sec.

sections.title: Phase Dash
sections.bodyText: Saprish creates void shades that dash towards each player, inflicting 25423 Shadow damage to all players within 8 yards of impact. This effect detonates all Void Bomb hit, triggering Umbral Nova .

sections.title: Umbral Nova
sections.bodyText: The Void Bomb releases a wave of void energy, inflicting 5085 Shadow damage to all players.

sections.title: Overload
sections.bodyText: Saprish releases a massive blast,  inflicting 50845 Shadow damage to all players and 35592 Shadow damage every 2 sec for 8 sec. This blast ignites all Void Bombs, inflicting 25423 Shadow damage to all players and applying Seeping Void .

sections.title: Seeping Void
sections.bodyText: Void seeps into target player, increasing their Shadow damage taken by 20% for 1 min. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Rending Void
sections.bodyText: Saprish's melee attacks inflict an additional 40676 Shadow damage.

sections.title: Shadow Pounce
sections.bodyText: Darkfang pounces on a player, inflicting 30507 Physical damage and additional 25423 Physical damage every 1 sec for 5 sec.

sections.title: Swoop
sections.bodyText: Shadewing swoops down on a random player, inflicting 61014 Physical damage. After reaching their destination, Shadewing releases a Dread Screech .

sections.title: Dread Screech
sections.bodyText: Shadewing releases a piercing screech, inflicting 101690 Shadow damage and disorienting all players for 4 sec.

name: Viceroy Nezhar
description:
Like others of his ilk, Viceroy Nezhar is obsessed with harnessing the power of the Void to serve his own ambitions. Drawn to the Seat of the Triumvirate by the immense darkness emanating from deep within, Nezhar will stop at nothing to claim it for his own.

Given the viceroy's experiments at infusing vessels with the power of shadow, the implications of what he might accomplish on Argus are dire indeed.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText:
Viceroy Nezhar creates a ring of [Collapsing Void] that becomes a [Void Storm]. Nezhar also blasts players with [Mass Void Infusion] that leaves behind void energy.

Umbral Tentacles answer the viceroy's call and attacks players with [Mind Flay].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Void Storm] inflicts heavy Shadow damage to players caught within it.
$bullet;Umbral Tentacles channel [Mind Flay] on a random player.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Void Storm] inflicts heavy Shadow damage to players caught within it.
$bullet;Umbral Tentacles channel [Mind Flay] on a random player.

sections.title: Tank
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Void Storm] inflicts heavy Shadow damage to players caught within it.
$bullet;Viceroy Nezhar demolishes his current target with [Mind Blast].

sections.title: Collapsing Void
sections.bodyText: At 100 energy, Nezhar teleports to the center of the room, knocking all players back while continuously pushes them with Repulsing Force . Void energy begins to collapse towards Nezhar, forming a Void Storm after 9 sec.

sections.title: Void Storm
sections.bodyText: Raging storm that inflicts 45761 Shadow damage every 2 sec for 10 sec. Additionally, players inside the storm are suffer an additional 91521 Shadow damage every 1 sec.

sections.title: Collapsing Void
sections.bodyText: At 100 energy, Nezhar teleports to the center of the room, knocking all players back while continuously pushes them with Repulsing Force . Void energy begins to collapse towards Nezhar, forming a Void Storm after 9 sec.

sections.title: Repulsing Force
sections.bodyText: Viceroy Nezhar pushes players back with powerful force.

sections.title: Void Storm
sections.bodyText: Raging storm that inflicts 45761 Shadow damage every 2 sec for 10 sec. Additionally, players inside the storm are suffer an additional 91521 Shadow damage every 1 sec.

sections.title: Umbral Tentacles
sections.bodyText: Nezhar summons void tentacles from underneath the ground.

sections.title: Unstable Entrance
sections.bodyText: Void tentacle tears into reality, inflicting 12711 Shadow damage to all players.

sections.title: Mind Flay
sections.bodyText: The Umbral Tentacle assaults a player's mind, inflicting 35592 Shadow damage every 2 sec for 10 sec.

sections.title: Gates of the Abyss
sections.bodyText: Viceroy Nezhar summons a gate to the void that unleashes Umbral Waves.

sections.title: Umbral Waves
sections.bodyText: Void waves inflict 76268 Shadow damage with an additional 30507 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 4 sec to players struck.

sections.title: Mass Void Infusion
sections.bodyText: Viceroy Nezhar infuses players with void energy, inflicting 30507 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 5 sec.

sections.title: Mind Blast
sections.bodyText: Viceroy Nezhar hurls a bolt of void energy at his target, inflicting 177958 Shadow damage.

name: L'ura
description:
When Velen and his followers fled Argus aboard the Genedar, the naaru L'ura stayed behind to buy the draenei time to escape. Kil'jaeden, enraged by this betrayal, ordered the wounded naaru sealed away in the Seat of the Triumvirate.

Over the long millennia that passed, L'ura fell from Light to Void. Her elegant song of courage and hope became a shadowy dirge of despair, luring those seeking to lay claim to her power.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText:
L'ura summons [Notes of Despair] that continues to play [Dirge of Despair] until they are destroyed. L'ura occasionally targets players with [Discordant Beam] that inflicts heavy Shadow damage and also silences any [Notes of Despair] it hits.

When all the [Notes of Despair] are silenced, Alleria destroys them with [Shattering Shot].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Discordant Beam] inflicts heavy Shadow damage to each targeted player and silences any [Notes of Despair] it hits.
$bullet; Alleria's [Siphon Void] causes L'ura to take massively increased damage.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Dirge of Despair] continues to damage all players until all [Notes of Despair] are silenced.
$bullet; [Discordant Beam] inflicts heavy Shadow damage to each targeted player and silences any [Notes of Despair] it hits.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; Each [Abyssal Lance] inflicts Shadow damage to the target player.
$bullet; [Discordant Beam] inflicts heavy Shadow damage to each targeted player and silences any [Notes of Despair] it hits.

sections.title: Notes of Despair
sections.bodyText: L'ura sings her dark song, inflicting 3813 Shadow damage to all players every 0.3 sec for 1.5 sec. This song creates multiple Note of Despair .

sections.title: Dirge of Despair
sections.bodyText: L'ura performs the Dirge of Despair , immediately inflicting 50845 Shadow damage to all players. This song causes all Note of Despair to radiates 5085 Shadow damage every 2 sec until they are silenced.

sections.title: Grim Chorus
sections.bodyText: L'ura shifts the Notes of Despair and begins a Grim Chorus for 20 sec, inflicting 127113 to players within 23 yards of each active Note of Despair . Each active Note of Despair afflicts players with Anguish every 2 sec until the Notes of Despair are destroyed.

sections.title: Symphony of the Eternal Night
sections.bodyText: L'ura channels the Eternal Night, attempting to instantly kill all players.

sections.title: Notes of Despair
sections.bodyText: L'ura sings her dark song, inflicting 3813 Shadow damage to all players every 0.3 sec for 1.5 sec. This song creates multiple Note of Despair .

sections.title: Dirge of Despair
sections.bodyText: L'ura performs the Dirge of Despair , immediately inflicting 50845 Shadow damage to all players. This song causes all Note of Despair to radiates 5085 Shadow damage every 2 sec until they are silenced.

sections.title: Grim Chorus
sections.bodyText: L'ura shifts the Notes of Despair and begins a Grim Chorus for 20 sec, inflicting 127113 to players within 23 yards of each active Note of Despair . Each active Note of Despair afflicts players with Anguish every 2 sec until the Notes of Despair are destroyed.

sections.title: Anguish
sections.bodyText: Notes of Despair cause players to become vulnerable to the effects of Dirge of Despair , increasing damage taken from it by 3%. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Symphony of the Eternal Night
sections.bodyText: L'ura channels the Eternal Night, attempting to instantly kill all players.

sections.title: Discordant Beam
sections.bodyText: L'ura blasts target players with sonic energy, inflicting 61014 Physical damage to all players in the line and silencing any Note of Despair hit. This damage ignores armor.

sections.title: Disintegrate
sections.bodyText: L'ura channels revolving void beams, inflicting 177958 Shadow damage to players struck.

sections.title: Abyssal Lance
sections.bodyText: L'ura passively tears open a rift to the void every 4 sec. After 3 rifts are opened, L'ura summons an Abyssal Lance from each of them, inflicting 50845 Shadow damage to her target for each lance. This effect closes the rifts.

sections.title: Backlash
sections.bodyText: L'ura breaks out of Alleria's hold and unleashes a wave of void energy that inflicts 91521 Shadow damage to all players, knocking them back.

sections.title: Siphon Void
sections.bodyText: Alleria drains the power of L'ura, stunning her and increasing her damage taken by 200% for 20 sec.

name: Ranjit
description: Ranjit has spent a lifetime honing his skill with the bladed chakram, and found that as his mastery of the traditional arakkoa weapon grew, he could shape the wind itself and wield it against his enemies. He now guards access to the inner sanctum of Skyreach, willing to die to protect the seat of arakkoa power atop the Spires.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText: Ranjit has mastered the use of his chakrams to create dangerous gusts of winds around the arena.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Ranjit hurls chakrams in various patterns to create damaging zones that move or rotate.
$bullet;[Gale Surge] inflicts moderate damage to the targeted player and knocks them back.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Ranjit hurls chakrams in various patterns to create damaging zones that move or rotate.
$bullet;Ranjit's [Fan of Blades] inflicts moderate damage to all players.
$bullet;[Gale Surge] inflicts moderate damage to the targeted player and knocks them back.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText: $bullet;Ranjit hurls chakrams in various patterns to create damaging zones that move or rotate.

sections.title: Chakram Vortex
sections.bodyText: Ranjit throws a powerful wind chakram to the center of the platform, inflicting 127113 Nature damage to players within 10 yards of the impact area. The chakram continues to spin, inflicting 76268 Nature damage to players it hits and knocking them back. The chakram forms raging wind vortexes that trail around the platform, inflicting 76268 Nature damage to any enemy hit and knocking them in the air.

sections.title: Gale Surge
sections.bodyText: Ranjit blasts target players with a powerful gust of wind, inflicting 71183 Nature damage and knocking them back

sections.title: Gale Surge
sections.bodyText: Ranjit blasts target players with a powerful gust of wind, inflicting 71183 Nature damage and knocking them back

sections.title: Coalesced Wind
sections.bodyText: Unleashes a powerful gust of wind that inflicts 101690 Nature damage to target player and knocking them back.

sections.title: Fan of Blades
sections.bodyText: Ranjit throws razor sharp blades in all directions, inflicting 50845 Physical damage and causing them to bleed, inflicting 30507 Physical damage every 2 sec for 6 sec.

sections.title: Wind Chakram
sections.bodyText: Ranjit hurls a wind chakram in front of him, inflicting 152535 Nature damage to all players caught in its path.

name: Araknath
description: The high arakkoa of Skyreach closely observed the civilization of the draenei, taking a keen interest in the towering Vigilants that guard their cities and temples. The arakkoa set out to create their own superior version, powered by solar energy - an unwaveringly obedient engine of destruction.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText: Araknath stands in the center of a massive solarium, positioned to receive solar energy in the form of channeled beams that will heal Araknath if they are not intercepted.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText: $bullet;Stand in the path of the solar rays focused on Araknath to prevent [Energize], but doing so will inflict damage.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Stand in the path of the solar rays focused on Araknath to prevent [Energize], but doing so will inflict damage.
$bullet;Araknath's [Burst] damages all players and increases the damage it deals each time it is cast.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText: $bullet;Avoid Araknath's [Fiery Smash] ability, which strikes with either the construct's left or right arm.

sections.title: Energize
sections.bodyText: Lesser constructs surrounding the arena focus light rays at Arknath, healing it for 1% every 0.5 sec Players blocking light rays suffer 5 Fire damage every 1 sec.

sections.title: Solar Infusion
sections.bodyText: Light rays that connect with Araknath infuse it with solar energy, inflicting 7627 Fire damage to all players and increasing Supernova 's damage done by 5%. This effect stacks. Solar Infusion is consumed after empowering Supernova .

sections.title: Heat Exhaustion
sections.bodyText: The lesser constructs exhaust heat in front of them after focusing energy into Araknath, inflicting 101690 Fire damage to players in the impact area.

sections.title: Energize
sections.bodyText: Lesser constructs surrounding the arena focus light rays at Arknath, healing it for 1% every 0.5 sec Players blocking light rays suffer 5 Fire damage every 1 sec.

sections.title: Light Ray
sections.bodyText: The solar beam inflicts 20338 Fire damage every 1 sec to players blocking it.

sections.title: Heat Exhaustion
sections.bodyText: The lesser constructs exhaust heat in front of them after focusing energy into Araknath, inflicting 101690 Fire damage to players in the impact area.

sections.title: Supernova
sections.bodyText: Araknath releases a burst of solar energy that inflicts 86437 Fire damage to all players.

sections.title: Fiery Smash
sections.bodyText: Araknath raises one of its arms and smashes the ground on that side, inflicting 127113 Fire damage to all players in the impact area and increases their damage taken from Fiery Smash by 300% for 1 min. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Defensive Protocol
sections.bodyText: Araknath is in a defensive stance, rooting itself and emitting blistering heat, inflicting 127113 Fire damage every 1 sec to players standing within 5 yards.

sections.title: Blast Wave
sections.bodyText: Araknath unleashes a wave of solar energy that inflicts 35592 Fire damage to all players and additional 10169 Fire damage every 1 sec for 20 sec. This effect stacks. This attack is only used by Araknath whenever he is not actively engaged in melee combat.

name: Rukhran
description: This majestic bird, rumored to be the progeny of the arakkoa sun-god Rukhmar, soars through the skies above the Spires of Arak. Rukhran has an affinity for solar energy, and can absorb the sun's power and unleash it to incinerate any prey.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText:
Rukhran summons Dawnwings to aid it in battle, each erupting in a [Blaze of Glory] upon defeat.

Periodically, Rukhran unleashes [Searing Quills], devastating all players in its line of sight across the platform.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Dawnwings will fixate on a player until they are defeated.
$bullet;[Searing Quills] inflicts heavy fire damage to players within line of sight.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Dawnwings will fixate on a player until they are defeated.
$bullet;[Searing Quills] inflicts heavy fire damage to players within line of sight.
$bullet; [Smoldering Egg] caught in the blast of [Blaze of Glory] will reawaken as a Dawnwing.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Dawnwings will fixate on a player until they are defeated.
$bullet;[Searing Quills] inflicts heavy fire damage to players within line of sight.
$bullet;Dawnwings inflict moderate damage to the group with [Burning Pursuit] while active.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Dawnwings will fixate on a player until they are defeated.
$bullet;[Searing Quills] inflicts heavy fire damage to players within line of sight.
$bullet;Dawnwings inflict moderate damage to the group with [Burning Pursuit] while active.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Rukhran casts [Screech] when there are no players in melee range for an extended period.
$bullet;[Searing Quills] inflicts heavy fire damage to players within line of sight.
$bullet; [Burning Claws] inflicts heavy fire damage.

sections.title: Sunbreak
sections.bodyText: Rukhran calls down a burst of solar energy that inflicts 76268 Fire damage to all players and summons a Sunwing.

sections.title: Blaze of Glory
sections.bodyText: The Sunwing erupts in a blaze of glory upon defeat, inflicting 152535 Fire damage to players within 8 yards of the impact area [ Smoldering Eggs caught in the blast remerge as a Sunwing.]

sections.title: Burning Pursuit
sections.bodyText: The Sunwing fixates on a random player and pulses its fiery energy at the cost of its health, burning 10% of its maximum health and inflicting 25423 Fire damage to all players every 2 sec.

sections.title: Sunbreak
sections.bodyText: Rukhran calls down a burst of solar energy that inflicts 76268 Fire damage to all players and summons a Sunwing.

sections.title: Smoldering Egg
sections.bodyText: Upon defeat, the Sunwing enters dormancy as a Smoldering Egg.

sections.title: Blaze of Glory
sections.bodyText: The Sunwing erupts in a blaze of glory upon defeat, inflicting 152535 Fire damage to players within 8 yards of the impact area [ Smoldering Eggs caught in the blast remerge as a Sunwing.]

sections.title: Burning Pursuit
sections.bodyText: The Sunwing fixates on a random player and pulses its fiery energy at the cost of its health, burning 10% of its maximum health and inflicting 25423 Fire damage to all players every 2 sec.

sections.title: Searing Quills
sections.bodyText: Rukhran unleashes waves of flaming quills, inflicting 113252 Fire damage every 1 sec to players in line of sight for 3 sec.

sections.title: Burning Claws
sections.bodyText: Rukhran lashes their current target with burning claws, inflicting 203380 Physical damage and 76268 Fire damage. Also casues the the target to burn, inflicting 30507 Fire damage every 2 sec for 8 sec.

sections.title: Screech
sections.bodyText: Rukhran unleashes a deafening screech, inflicting 177958 Sonic damage to all players. This attack is only used if Ruhkhran is not actively engaged in melee combat.

name: High Sage Viryx
description: High Sage Viryx has dedicated her rule wholly to harnessing Apexis artifacts in service of Rukhmar's will. At last, thanks to the completion of the massive crystal superweapon that focuses the sun's energy to destroy their enemies, it is time for the arakkoa to claim their rightful place as rulers of Draenor.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText: High Sage Viryx calls down the powerful arakkoa focusing lens to scorch the ground beneath her foes.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Lens Flare] focuses on a player and burns any player in its path.
$bullet; [Cast Down] calls a Solar Zealot that picks up a random player and attempts to drop them over the edge of Skyreach.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Lens Flare] focuses on a random player and burns any player in its path while leaving behind [Blazing Ground].
$bullet; [Cast Down] calls a Solar Zealot that picks up a random player and attempts to drop them over the edge of Skyreach.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Lens Flare] focuses on a player and burns any player in its path.
$bullet; [Scorching Ray] inflicts moderate damage over time to targeted players.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Lens Flare] focuses on a random player and burns any player in its path while leaving behind [Blazing Ground].
$bullet; [Scorching Ray] inflicts moderate damage over time to targeted players.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;High Sage Viryx's [Solar Burst] inflicts significant Fire damage to its target.
$bullet; [Cast Down] calls a Solar Zealot that picks up a random player and attempts to drop them over the edge of Skyreach.

sections.title: Cast Down
sections.bodyText: High Sage Viryx summons a Solar Zealot above a random player that will attempt to carry them off the balcony and drop them to their death below.

sections.title: Lens Flare
sections.bodyText: High Sage Viryx commands the solar crystals focus their intense energy on a player, inflicting 101690 Fire damage to enemies within 6 yards of impact

sections.title: Lens Flare
sections.bodyText: High Sage Viryx commands the solar crystals focus their intense energy on a player, inflicting 101690 Fire damage to enemies within 6 yards of impact

sections.title: Blazing Ground
sections.bodyText: Lens Flare creates areas of intense heat that inflict 50845 Fire damage every 1 sec to players standing in the area.

sections.title: Scorching Ray
sections.bodyText: High Sage Viryx scorches several players with focused sunlight, inflicting 50845 Fire damage and an additional 25423  Fire damage every 1 sec for 5 sec.

sections.title: Solar Blast
sections.bodyText: High Sage Viryx blasts their current target with solar energy, inflicting 228803 Fire damage.

name: Vexamus
description:
As one of the most tenured professors in the academy, Maxdormu uses his powers as a bronze dragon to help bring his history lessons to life. 

While this proves to be quite an educational and fun experience, it can occasionally go awry. Vexamus is one of Professor Maxdormu's favorite lessons, but if any historical detail is inaccurate he will be quick to scold any rowdy students.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText: Professor Maxdormu conjures a lesson that recalls the story of Vexamus, introducing the elemental's arsenal of Arcane abilities as the narrative progresses. The professor's magic book summons [Arcane Orbs] that gravitate towards Vexamus and grant it more power if not intercepted.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Arcane Expulsion] inflicts heavy damage in a frontal cone.
$bullet;Vexamus gains energy from absorbing [Arcane Orbs].

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Mana Bombs] leave behind a pool of [Corrupted Mana] after detonating.
$bullet;Vexamus gains energy from absorbing [Arcane Orbs].

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;[Mana Bombs] leave behind a pool of [Corrupted Mana] after detonating.
$bullet;Vexamus gains energy from absorbing [Arcane Orbs].

sections.title: Arcane Orbs
sections.bodyText: The Professor conjures enchanted orbs from the magic book that inflict 152535 Arcane damage within 3 yards of impact and begin to gravitate towards Vexamus. If an orb is absorbed by Vexamus, the elemental inflict 61175 Arcane damage to all players. If an orb is absorbed by a player, it will inflict 50987 Arcane Damage to them.

sections.title: Oversurge
sections.bodyText: Increases damage taken from absorbing Arcane Orbs by 200% for 18 sec.

sections.title: Arcane Fissure
sections.bodyText: Upon reaching 100 energy, Vexamus explodes with overwhelming power inflicting 81352 Arcane damage to all players and pushing them back. Fissures erupt multiple times at player locations, each inflicting 152535 Arcane damage within 4 yards.

sections.title: Arcane Fissure
sections.bodyText: 3 sec cast Upon reaching 100 energy, Vexamus explodes with overwhelming power inflicting 81352 Arcane damage to all players and pushing them back.

sections.title: Mana Bombs
sections.bodyText: Vexamus infuses up to 3 players with explosive mana, inflicting 25423 Arcane damage every 1 sec for 4 sec. Upon expiration, the mana will detonate inflicting 50845 Arcane damage within 4 yards and leaving a pool of Corrupted Mana for 1 min.

sections.title: Corrupted Mana
sections.bodyText: Corrupted Mana inflicts 91564 Arcane damage every 1 sec to players inside and reduces their movement speed by 30%.

sections.title: Arcane Expulsion
sections.bodyText: Vexamus ejects a mass of arcane energy inflicting 228901 Arcane damage to players in front of it.

name: Overgrown Ancient
description: Professors Mystakria and Ichistrasz have used just a touch too much magic in an effort to clear the botany labs. Now they have a big, leafy problem on their hands in the form of an Overgrown Ancient that threatens to undo all their hard work.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText:
The Overgrown Ancient attempts to crush the tank with [Barkbreaker] and repeatedly forces waves of dormant lashers to grow with [Germinate].

Upon reaching 100 energy, the Overgrown Ancient uses [Burst Forth] to awaken all dormant lashers that have not yet been killed, causing them to attack players.

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Being hit by [Barkbreaker] greatly increases Physical damage taken for a short time after.
$bullet;Once awakened by [Burst Forth], Hungry Lashers can inflict significant damage if left unchecked.
$bullet;Ancient Branches cast [Healing Touch], which can be interrupted.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;Hungry Lashers can be damaged and killed even before the Ancient awakens them with [Burst Forth].
$bullet;Ancient Branches cast [Healing Touch], which can be interrupted.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet;The target of [Barkbreaker] takes greatly increased Physical damage for a short time after being hit.
$bullet;[Burst Forth] inflicts significant damage to all party members.

sections.title: Germinate
sections.bodyText: The Overgrown Ancient forces dormant lasher seeds beneath all players' feet to sprout every 1 sec for 4 sec. Each emerging seed inflicts 127113 Physical damage to players within 4 yds and knocks them back, then leaves behind a dormant Hungry Lasher.

sections.title: Lasher Toxin
sections.bodyText: The Hungry Lasher's attacks have a chance to poison the target, inflicting 5085 Nature damage every 3 sec for 9 sec. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Burst Forth
sections.bodyText: Upon reaching 100 energy, the Overgrown Ancient releases its abundant life magic to awaken all dormant Lashers, inflicting 81352 Nature damage to all players as they burst free from the ground.

sections.title: Branch Out
sections.bodyText: The Overgrown Ancient throws one of its own branches at a location, inflicting 152535 Physical damage to players within 8 yds and knocking them back. The Ancient Branch then animates and attacks players.

sections.title: Splinterbark
sections.bodyText: Splinters erupt from the Ancient as its branch is torn away, causing all players to bleed for 50845 every 3 sec for 1 min. This effect stacks.

sections.title: Healing Touch
sections.bodyText: Heal an ally for 393273.

sections.title: Abundance
sections.bodyText: Upon death, release a spark of life energy that bursts after 3.5 sec, healing allies and players within 8 yds for 655456, and removing all applications of Splinterbark .

sections.title: Barkbreaker
sections.bodyText: The Overgrown Ancient stomps its target with crushing force, inflicting 244246 Physical damage and increasing Physical damage taken by 100% for 9 sec.

name: Crawth
description: The Lish Llrath, or Talon Toss, arena is quite literally for the birds these days. Crawth has taken up residence in the center of the arena and has no immediate plans to move out soon. Let's see if we can get her to play ball... and leave.

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText: Nesting on the sporting grounds of the old academy, Crawth loudly and violently objects to those that would reclaim the space. Unbeknownst to the massive bird, the goals of the ancient arena still contain some of their original power...

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; [Savage Peck] inflicts high damage over time.
$bullet; Scoring goals during[Play Ball!] can activate the field's [Firestorm] or [Gale Force].
$bullet; [Overpowering Gust] knocks away players in front of Crawth.

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; Scoring goals during[Play Ball!] can activate the field's [Firestorm] or [Gale Force].
$bullet; [Overpowering Gust] knocks away players in front of Crawth.
$bullet; [Deafening Screech] interrupts spells and silences targets that are currently casting.

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; Scoring goals during[Play Ball!] can activate the field's [Firestorm] or [Gale Force].
$bullet; [Overpowering Gust] knocks away players in front of Crawth.
$bullet; [Deafening Screech] interrupts spells and silences targets that are currently casting.

sections.title: Play Ball!
sections.bodyText: The goals of The Pitch activate, allowing players to score points in either the Goal of the Searing Blaze or the Goal of the Rushing Winds.

sections.title: Goal of the Searing Blaze
sections.bodyText: Scoring 3 points in the Goal of the Searing Blaze triggers a Firestorm .

sections.title: Firestorm
sections.bodyText: The goal erupts in flames, launching several motes of fire at the arena. Each mote inflicts 127113 Fire damage and stuns players for 3 sec within 5 yards of where it lands. The Firestorm also stuns Crawth and makes her take 75% increased damage for 12 sec and afflicts her with Blistering Fire .

sections.title: Blistering Fire
sections.bodyText: Fire emits searing heat that inflicts 17796 Fire damage every 2 sec to all players.

sections.title: Goal of the Rushing Winds
sections.bodyText: Scoring 3 points in the Goal of the Rushing Winds triggers Gale Force .

sections.title: Gale Force
sections.bodyText: Fierce winds rush out of the goal, knocking Crawth in the air and pushing players back and summoning Roving Cyclones for 15 sec. Each mote can be picked up to grant 45% Haste and 50% movement speed for 20 sec. This effect also provides immunity to being pushed by Gale Force .

sections.title: Roving Cyclone
sections.bodyText: Creates cyclones that move around, inflicting 127113 Nature damage and knocking back any player it contacts.

sections.title: Ruinous Winds
sections.bodyText: At 75% and 45% health, Crawth unleashes a devasting gust of winds every 3 sec, inflicting 101690 Nature damage to all players and knocking them back.

sections.title: Overpowering Gust
sections.bodyText: Crawth faces a random player and flaps her wings, inflicting 254476 Nature damage and knocking back all players in front of her.

sections.title: Deafening Screech
sections.bodyText: Crawth releases a loud screech, causing a sonic eruption at all players, inflicting 61014 Nature damage. This effect interrupts spell casts and also silences any player interrupted in this manner for 6 sec.

sections.title: Deafening Screech
sections.bodyText: Crawth releases a loud screech, causing a sonic eruption at all player locations, inflicting 61014 Nature damage and additional 20338 Nature damage every 1 sec for 8 sec to all players within 4 yards of each location. This effect interrupts spell casts and also silences any player interrupted in this manner for 6 sec.

sections.title: Savage Peck
sections.bodyText: Crawth viciously pecks at her target, inflicting 228803 Physical damage instantly with an additional 35592 Physical damage every 1 sec for 10 sec.

name: Echo of Doragosa
description: Headteacher Doragosa thought of everything when it came to Algeth'ar Academy. Including a complex simulacrum of herself to take care of any day to day tasks and upkeep while the Isles lay dormant. Now that the Academy is open once again, perhaps she can use it to help keep track of all the new students. It's done a fine job in the interim, and is absolutely the one spell that did not degrade after all these years. Perfectly stable and helpful. Right?

sections.title: Overview
sections.bodyText: The Echo of Doragosa assaults her enemies with powerful Arcane attacks, applying [Overwhelming Power] and creating [Arcane Rifts].

sections.title: Tanks
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; Multiple applications of [Overwhelming Power] will create [Arcane Rifts] .
$bullet; [Astral Blast] inflicts heavy arcane damage and applies an application of[Overwhelming Power].

sections.title: Healers
sections.bodyText: $bullet; Multiple applications of [Overwhelming Power] will create [Arcane Rifts] .

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.bodyText:
$bullet; Multiple applications of [Overwhelming Power] will create [Arcane Rifts] .
$bullet;

sections.title: Overwhelming Power
sections.bodyText: The Echo of Doragosa's arcane attacks leave wild energy on players they hit, inflicting 15254 Arcane damage every 1 sec and increasing their Haste 5%. This effect stacks. At 3 applications, this effect erupts into an Arcane Rift.

sections.title: Arcane Rift
sections.bodyText: The excess power coalesces into a rift of arcane energy, inflicting 50845 Arcane damage every 1 sec to players within. This rift occasionally releases Uncontrolled Energy .

sections.title: Uncontrolled Energy
sections.bodyText: Wild Magic explodes on contact with a player, inflicting 127113 Arcane damage to players within 4 yds. Applies Overwhelming Power to all targets struck.

sections.title: Unleash Energy
sections.bodyText: The Echo of Doragosa unleashes powerful arcane energy, inflicting 50845 Arcane damage to all players and opening Arcane Rift in nearby locations.

sections.title: Arcane Rift
sections.bodyText: The excess power coalesces into a rift of arcane energy, inflicting 50845 Arcane damage every 1 sec to players within. This rift occasionally releases Uncontrolled Energy .

sections.title: Uncontrolled Energy
sections.bodyText: Wild Magic explodes on contact with a player, inflicting 127113 Arcane damage to players within 4 yds. Applies Overwhelming Power to all targets struck.

sections.title: Astral Blast
sections.bodyText: The Echo of Doragosa blasts the target player with powerful arcane energy, inflicting 152535 Arcane damage and applying Overwhelming Power .

sections.title: Power Vacuum
sections.bodyText: The Echo of Doragosa pulls all players to her location, then strikes with explosive energy inflicting 203325 Arcane damage and knocking back all players within 20 yards. Applies Overwhelming Power to anyone hit.

sections.title: Power Vacuum
sections.bodyText: The Echo of Doragosa pulls all players to her location, then strikes with explosive energy inflicting 203325 Arcane damage and knocking back all players within 20 yards.

sections.title: Arcane Missiles
sections.bodyText: The Echo of Doragosa inflicts 50831 Arcane damage to a player. Applies Overwhelming Power to the target.

sections.title: Arcane Missiles
sections.bodyText: The Echo of Doragosa inflicts 50831 Arcane damage to a player.

sections.title: Energy Bomb
sections.bodyText: The Echo of Doragosa marks random players with arcane energy for 6 sec.  When the Energy Bomb expires, it inflicts 61014 Arcane damage to all players within 8 yards. Applies Overwhelming Power to the target.

sections.title: Energy Bomb
sections.bodyText: The Echo of Doragosa marks a player arcane energy for 6 sec.  When the Energy Bomb expires, it inflicts 61014 Arcane damage to all players within 8 yards.
